mainIndustries.en: Main industries included grain and cotton agriculture, pastoralism, textiles, silk weaving, leatherworking, metalworking, shipbuilding, ceramics, military supply production, spice and coffee transit, and regional commerce tied to taxation.

tradeGoods.zh: 出口与转口货物包括谷物、羊毛、皮革、棉花、丝绸、烟草、蜡、铜、地毯、干果、咖啡和香料；输入品包括白银、奢侈纺织品、钟表、武器原料及部分殖民商品。
tradeGoods.en: Exports and re-exports included grain, wool, leather, cotton, silk, tobacco, wax, copper, carpets, dried fruits, coffee, and spices; imports included silver, luxury textiles, clocks, military raw materials, and some colonial goods.

householdWealth.zh: 家庭财富差异极大。城市商人、税农、宗教基金管理者和地方显贵可积累显著动产与地产；普通农户多维持低度盈余，受赋役、价格波动和军队过境影响明显。
householdWealth.en: Household wealth varied enormously. Urban merchants, tax-farmers, waqf administrators, and provincial notables could accumulate substantial movable and landed wealth; ordinary peasant households usually maintained only modest surpluses and were vulnerable to taxes, price volatility, and troop movements.

unit.zh: 阿克切/年人均可支配收入（估算）

economicSystem.zh: 经济制度为农业税基帝国经济与受国家规制的市场体系结合。国家通过土地制度、价格监管、行会、关税和包税控制重要资源，但地方市场、长途商贸和私人资本在17世纪愈发重要。
economicSystem.en: The economic system combined an agrarian tax-based imperial economy with a regulated market order. The state controlled key resources through land arrangements, price regulation, guilds, customs, and tax-farming, but local markets, long-distance commerce, and private capital were increasingly important in the seventeenth century.

category.zh: 宗教基金、公共工程与赈济
category.en: Religious endowments, public works, and relief

treasuryDescription.zh: 1648年的国库状况大体可维持运转，但并不宽裕。长期战争、银价波动、货币贬值、耶尼切里饷银压力与地方财政外流都限制了中央积蓄。帝国仍有庞大征收能力，但现金流比16世纪巅峰时期更紧张。
treasuryDescription.en: In 1648 the treasury was broadly functional but not abundant. Long warfare, silver-price fluctuations, debasement, Janissary pay pressures, and fiscal leakage to the provinces all constrained central reserves. The empire still retained enormous extracting capacity, but cash flow was tighter than at its sixteenth-century peak.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政政策以维持军队饷给、保障首都供给和守住行省税源为优先。政府依赖包税、临时摊派、币值调整和向富裕地区强化征收来平衡预算，同时尽量避免破坏农业税基。
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal policy prioritized army pay, provisioning the capital, and preserving provincial tax bases. The government relied on tax-farming, extraordinary levies, coinage adjustments, and heavier extraction from wealthier regions to balance accounts, while trying not to destroy the agrarian tax base.

description.zh: 驻首都及主要要塞的常备火器步兵，是帝国中央军政的重要支柱，但到17世纪纪律与编制已较16世纪有所松弛。
description.en: Standing firearm infantry stationed in the capital and major fortresses, forming a core pillar of imperial power, though by the seventeenth century discipline and organization had loosened compared with the sixteenth century.

description.zh: 以采邑和地方动员为基础的骑兵力量，仍在巴尔干和安纳托利亚边区发挥作用，但相对重要性下降。
description.en: Cavalry based on timar holdings and provincial mobilization, still important in the Balkans and Anatolian frontiers, though declining in relative significance.

name.zh: 地方步兵、塞克班与雇佣兵

description.zh: 包括地方征发火枪手、临时雇佣部队和边地驻防军，在对萨法维、哈布斯堡与内部叛乱作战中大量使用。
description.en: Included provincially raised musketeers, temporary mercenary contingents, and frontier garrisons, heavily used against the Safavids, Habsburgs, and internal rebellions.

description.zh: 由舰船水手、海军步兵、炮手和船坞人员组成，主要活动于地中海、爱琴海、黑海和部分红海航线。
description.en: Composed of sailors, naval infantry, gunners, and dockyard personnel, operating chiefly in the Mediterranean, Aegean, Black Sea, and parts of the Red Sea routes.

description.zh: 负责围城炮、野战炮、要塞工事和军械制造，是奥斯曼长期保持强大战争能力的重要技术兵种。
description.en: Responsible for siege guns, field artillery, fortifications, and ordnance manufacture, forming a key technical arm of Ottoman military strength.

description.zh: 来自克里米亚鞑靼、阿拉伯部族、库尔德和其他边地力量，用于侦察、袭扰和机动作战。
description.en: Drawn from the Crimean Tatars, Arab tribes, Kurds, and other frontier forces, used for scouting, raiding, and mobile warfare.

commanderInChief.zh: 苏丹易卜拉欣（名义上）与大维齐尔（实际统帅）
commanderInChief.en: Sultan Ibrahim nominally, with the Grand Vizier as the practical commander

technology.zh: 军队广泛使用火绳枪、火炮、筑城技术和舰炮体系。相较16世纪的领先地位，1648年的奥斯曼军事技术仍属强国水平，但在训练、财政支撑和战术革新上逐渐面临哈布斯堡与西欧国家竞争。
technology.en: The military made extensive use of matchlocks, artillery, fortification methods, and naval guns. Compared with its sixteenth-century lead, Ottoman military technology in 1648 still ranked among the great powers, but it was increasingly challenged by Habsburg and western European improvements in training, finance, and tactical innovation.

threats.zh: 主要外部威胁来自萨法维伊朗、哈布斯堡边境、威尼斯海上竞争以及黑海和东欧局势变化；内部则面临地方军阀化、耶尼切里骚动、财政失衡和安纳托利亚治安问题。
threats.en: Main external threats came from Safavid Iran, the Habsburg frontier, Venetian naval rivalry, and changes in the Black Sea and eastern European balance; internal challenges included provincial militarization, Janissary unrest, fiscal imbalance, and insecurity in Anatolia.

populationDescription.zh: 帝国人口约2500万，分布于安纳托利亚、巴尔干、黎凡特、伊拉克、西阿拉伯、埃及和北非部分地区。其人口极具宗教、语言和族群多样性，是当时世界上最复杂的大帝国之一。
populationDescription.en: The empire's population was about 25 million, spread across Anatolia, the Balkans, the Levant, Iraq, western Arabia, Egypt, and parts of North Africa. It was highly diverse in religion, language, and ethnicity, making it one of the most complex great empires of its age.

socialClasses.zh: 社会阶层包括苏丹与宫廷、军政官僚、乌里玛、地方显贵、商人与行会手工业者、城市平民、农民、牧民、部族成员以及奴隶和被释放奴隶群体。宗教社群身份与阶层身份交织，共同塑造帝国社会。
socialClasses.en: Social strata included the sultan and court, military-administrative officeholders, ulema, provincial notables, merchants and guild artisans, urban commoners, peasants, pastoralists, tribal populations, and slave and freed-slave groups. Confessional identity intersected with class to shape imperial society.

allies.zh: 正式稳定盟友较少，但与克里米亚汗国保持紧密从属—合作关系，并在欧洲政治中灵活利用法国等反哈布斯堡势力的外交接近。
allies.en: The empire had few formal stable allies, but maintained a close subordinate-cooperative relationship with the Crimean Khanate and at times benefited diplomatically from anti-Habsburg alignment with powers such as France.

enemies.zh: 主要对手为萨法维伊朗、奥地利哈布斯堡、威尼斯，以及在边境与海上不断变动的东欧和地中海敌对势力。
enemies.en: Its principal rivals were Safavid Iran, the Austrian Habsburgs, Venice, and shifting hostile forces on the eastern European and Mediterranean frontiers.

foreignPolicy.zh: 外交政策以维持多线边疆平衡、保护朝圣与商路、控制黑海与东地中海战略节点、阻止哈布斯堡扩张并压制萨法维影响为核心。帝国善于结合战争、和约、册封、贸易特许与藩属体系管理周边秩序。
foreignPolicy.en: Foreign policy centered on balancing multiple frontiers, protecting pilgrimage and trade routes, controlling strategic nodes in the Black Sea and eastern Mediterranean, checking Habsburg expansion, and containing Safavid influence. The empire managed its surrounding order through a combination of war, treaties, investiture, trade privileges, and vassal arrangements.

era.zh: 近世前期

keyInnovations.zh: 关键技术与制度能力包括成熟的火药武器体系、围城炮与要塞建设、帝国造船厂、长距离行政档案与财政核算、道路与驿站网络、宗教基金支持的城市基础设施，以及跨洲粮食和军需调运能力。
keyInnovations.en: Key technologies and institutional capacities included a mature gunpowder weapons system, siege artillery and fortification building, imperial dockyards, long-distance administrative record keeping and fiscal accounting, road and relay networks, urban infrastructure supported by religious endowments, and the ability to transport food and military supplies across continents.

strengths.zh: 帝国疆域广阔，人口与税基庞大，地处三洲交通要冲，拥有经验丰富的军政体系、多元城市经济与深厚的合法性传统。君士坦丁堡、开罗和阿勒颇等城市为其提供强大的人力、财富和战略纵深。
strengths.en: The empire possessed vast territory, a large population and tax base, a strategic position astride three continents, an experienced military-bureaucratic system, diverse urban economies, and deep traditions of legitimacy. Cities such as Constantinople, Cairo, and Aleppo provided manpower, wealth, and strategic depth.

weaknesses.zh: 其弱点在于宫廷派系斗争、苏丹个人统治能力不稳、耶尼切里与地方武装政治化、货币贬值、财政征收效率下降，以及行省地方显贵日益坐大。中央虽强，但控制的实际执行力不如巅峰时期。
weaknesses.en: Its weaknesses lay in palace factionalism, instability in the personal quality of sultanic rule, politicization of the Janissaries and provincial armed groups, currency debasement, declining fiscal efficiency, and the growing strength of provincial notables. The center remained powerful, but its effective control was weaker than at its peak.

outlook.zh: 1648年的奥斯曼帝国仍然稳定且属于世界级强权，短期内没有崩溃危险。未来前景取决于能否恢复财政纪律、约束军队和地方势力、改进行政效率，并在对哈布斯堡与萨法维的长期竞争中保持战略灵活性。
outlook.en: In 1648 the Ottoman Empire was still stable and remained a world-class great power, with no immediate danger of collapse. Its future would depend on restoring fiscal discipline, restraining the military and provincial magnates, improving administrative efficiency, and maintaining strategic flexibility in its long competition with the Habsburgs and Safavids.

description.zh: 奥斯曼帝国仍控制安纳托利亚、巴尔干、阿拉伯核心地区及埃及，是横跨三洲的大帝国。
description.en: The Ottoman Empire still controlled Anatolia, the Balkans, core Arab lands, and Egypt, remaining a transcontinental great empire.

ideology.zh: 奥斯曼王朝正统，伊斯兰苏丹制，通过科普律吕大维齐尔恢复帝国秩序与军事荣光
ideology.en: Ottoman dynastic legitimacy, Islamic sultanate, restoration of imperial order and military glory through the Köprülü grand viziers

headquarters.zh: 君士坦丁堡（托普卡帕宫）

relationship.zh: 穆罕默德四世即位时年仅七岁，宫廷政局动荡不安。经历一系列无能的大维齐尔后，1656年起科普律吕家族大维齐尔开始掌权，厉行整顿吏治、恢复军事纪律，使帝国重新走上强化之路。苏丹本人热衷狩猎，将政务大权委托给科普律吕大维齐尔。
relationship.en: Mehmed IV ascended the throne at age seven amid great court turmoil. After a succession of incompetent grand viziers, the Köprülü family assumed the grand vizierate from 1656, rigorously reforming administration and restoring military discipline to set the empire on a path of reinvigoration. The sultan himself was devoted to hunting and delegated governmental power largely to the Köprülü grand viziers.

description.zh: 穆罕默德四世（1642—1693）在1648年即位时面对的是一个危机四伏的帝国：财政枯竭、军队哗变频繁、克里特战争久拖不决、地方叛乱此起彼伏。其父苏丹易卜拉欣因暴政被废杀，幼主登基后宫廷由太后和近侍集团操控。这一危局直到科普律吕·穆罕默德帕夏于1656年出任大维齐尔后才根本扭转。科普律吕家族此后连续三代担任大维齐尔，实施了大规模的财政、军事和行政改革：严惩贪腐官员、整顿耶尼切里军纪、重新确立中央对行省的控制权。在科普律吕改革下，奥斯曼帝国一度恢复扩张势头，发动了对威尼斯属克里特的最终攻势和1683年的维也纳之围。但苏丹个人对政务缺乏兴趣，帝国的实际走向在很大程度上取决于大维齐尔的才能。
description.en: When Mehmed IV (1642–1693) ascended the throne in 1648, he inherited an empire in deep crisis: exhausted finances, frequent military mutinies, a protracted Cretan War, and provincial rebellions erupting in succession. His father Sultan Ibrahim had been deposed and executed for tyranny, and after the young sultan's accession the court was dominated by the queen mother and palace favorites. This crisis was not fundamentally reversed until Köprülü Mehmed Pasha assumed the grand vizierate in 1656. The Köprülü family then held the grand vizierate for three successive generations, implementing sweeping fiscal, military, and administrative reforms: severely punishing corrupt officials, disciplining the Janissaries, and reasserting central control over the provinces. Under the Köprülü reforms, the Ottoman Empire temporarily regained its expansionist momentum, launching the final offensive against Venetian Crete and the 1683 Siege of Vienna. Yet the sultan's personal disinterest in governance meant the empire's actual trajectory depended heavily on the capabilities of the grand vizier.

role.zh: 奥斯曼帝国苏丹，幼年即位，后以狩猎闻名
role.en: Ottoman sultan who ascended as a child and became known for his passion for hunting

name.zh: 科普律吕·穆罕默德帕夏

role.zh: 科普律吕改革的开创者，恢复帝国秩序的关键人物
role.en: Founder of the Köprülü reform era and key figure in restoring imperial order

leader.zh: 耶尼切里阿迦（军团统领）

ideology.zh: 军团特权维护，反对削减军饷与编制改革，利用政治影响力干预朝政
ideology.en: Defense of corps privileges, opposition to pay cuts and organizational reform, leveraging political influence to intervene in court politics

headquarters.zh: 君士坦丁堡（耶尼切里营地）

relationship.zh: 耶尼切里军团从原本忠于苏丹的精锐奴隶步兵，蜕变为一支高度政治化的武装力量。他们频繁发动兵变胁迫朝廷更换大维齐尔甚至废立苏丹，1648年苏丹易卜拉欣的被废即与耶尼切里的压力密切相关。军团坚决抵制任何削弱其特权的改革。
relationship.en: The Janissary Corps had devolved from elite slave infantry loyal to the sultan into a highly politicized armed force. They frequently staged mutinies to coerce the court into replacing grand viziers or even deposing sultans—the 1648 overthrow of Sultan Ibrahim was closely linked to Janissary pressure. The corps fiercely resisted any reforms that threatened their privileges.

description.zh: 耶尼切里军团是奥斯曼帝国历史最悠久、最具标志性的军事力量，起源于14世纪的基督徒少年征召（德夫希尔梅）制度。到17世纪中叶，德夫希尔梅制度已名存实亡，耶尼切里身份日益世袭化，军团成员兼营商业手工业，战斗力严重下降。然而他们在君士坦丁堡拥有强大的政治影响力，控制首都治安与市场秩序，并以武力威胁干预宫廷政治。1648年穆罕默德四世即位前后的政局动荡中，耶尼切里多次发动骚乱和兵变，勒索赏赐、杀害大臣。他们的存在是帝国改革的最大内部障碍之一——任何触动其利益的改革者都面临被推翻甚至被杀的风险。科普律吕大维齐尔不得不在严厉打击与谨慎安抚之间寻找平衡。
description.en: The Janissary Corps was the oldest and most iconic military force of the Ottoman Empire, originating from the 14th-century devshirme system of recruiting Christian boys. By the mid-17th century, the devshirme system had become moribund in practice; Janissary status was increasingly hereditary, members engaged in commerce and crafts, and combat effectiveness had seriously declined. Yet they wielded formidable political influence in Constantinople, controlling the capital's policing and market order and using armed force to intervene in palace politics. During the political turmoil surrounding Mehmed IV's accession in 1648, the Janissaries staged multiple riots and mutinies, extorting bonuses and killing ministers. Their existence constituted one of the greatest internal obstacles to imperial reform—any reformer who touched their interests risked overthrow or assassination. The Köprülü grand viziers had to navigate carefully between harsh crackdowns and cautious conciliation.

role.zh: 耶尼切里军团最高指挥官，在朝政中具有举足轻重的影响力
role.en: Supreme commander of the Janissary Corps, wielding crucial influence in court politics

role.zh: 耶尼切里精神导师与宗教纽带，苏菲派贝克塔什教团与军团关系密切
role.en: Spiritual guides and religious bond of the Janissaries; the Sufi Bektashi order was closely linked to the corps

ideology.zh: 地方自治与利益保护，以包税权和土地控制维持家族势力，抵制中央过度干预
ideology.en: Local autonomy and interest protection, maintaining family power through tax-farming rights and land control, resisting excessive central interference

headquarters.zh: 各省城市与庄园（安纳托利亚、巴尔干、阿拉伯诸省）
headquarters.en: Provincial cities and estates (Anatolia, Balkans, Arab provinces)

relationship.zh: 地方显贵是奥斯曼帝国行省权力结构中日益重要的力量。他们通过包税权、大地产和与中央官员的庇护关系积累财富与权势，在地方行政、税收和军事动员中发挥实际主导作用。中央对他们既依赖又忌惮，科普律吕改革试图重新收紧中央控制，但收效参差不齐。
relationship.en: Provincial notables were an increasingly important force in the Ottoman provincial power structure. They accumulated wealth and power through tax-farming rights, large estates, and patronage relationships with central officials, playing a de facto leading role in local administration, taxation, and military mobilization. The center both depended on and feared them; the Köprülü reforms attempted to reassert central control, but with uneven results.

description.zh: 阿扬（ayân）指17世纪以降在奥斯曼各行省崛起的地方权力人物群体。随着帝国中央权威的波动和蒂马尔骑兵制度的衰落，包税制（iltizâm）日益成为帝国财政的主要工具，而能够承包大额税源的地方显贵因此迅速壮大。他们在安纳托利亚、巴尔干、叙利亚、伊拉克和埃及等地建立了世袭性的地方权力网络，控制税收、司法调解和民兵武装，与中央派遣的总督和法官形成复杂的合作—竞争关系。在巴尔干地区，基督徒和穆斯林显贵同样活跃；在阿拉伯行省，部族酋长和宗教领袖往往兼具阿扬身份。这一群体的壮大标志着奥斯曼帝国从集中化帝国向分权化权力格局的长期演变，其趋势在18—19世纪进一步加速。
description.en: The ayan (ayân) were a class of local power figures who rose across Ottoman provinces from the 17th century onward. As central authority fluctuated and the timar cavalry system declined, tax-farming (iltizâm) became the empire's primary fiscal instrument, and local notables capable of contracting large tax revenues grew rapidly in power. They established hereditary local power networks in Anatolia, the Balkans, Syria, Iraq, Egypt, and elsewhere, controlling taxation, judicial mediation, and militia forces while developing complex cooperative-competitive relationships with centrally appointed governors and judges. In the Balkans, both Christian and Muslim notables were active; in the Arab provinces, tribal chiefs and religious leaders often doubled as ayan. The rise of this class marked the Ottoman Empire's long-term evolution from a centralized empire toward a more decentralized power structure, a trend that accelerated further in the 18th and 19th centuries.

role.zh: 安纳托利亚地方望族，以包税与土地控制维持区域影响力
role.en: An Anatolian notable family maintaining regional influence through tax-farming and land control

role.zh: 黎巴嫩德鲁兹领主家族，地方自治传统深厚
role.en: Lebanese Druze lordly family with deep traditions of local autonomy

governmentForm.zh: 受奥斯曼宗主权约束的鞑靼世袭汗国，由格来家族统治并与贵族氏族共治
governmentForm.en: A hereditary Tatar khanate under Ottoman suzerainty, ruled by the Giray dynasty in partnership with aristocratic clans

socialStructure.zh: 社会由格来王族、贝伊贵族、米尔扎与部族首领、伊斯兰教法学者与宗教人士、自由牧民与农民、城镇工商业者，以及大量奴隶与被掳人口构成；草原游牧与定居农业并存
socialStructure.en: Society consisted of the Giray royal house, bey aristocracy, mirzas and tribal chiefs, Islamic scholars and clergy, free pastoralists and peasants, urban artisans and merchants, and a large enslaved and captive population; steppe nomadism coexisted with settled agriculture

rulingClass.zh: 格来王族与四大贵族家族为核心的鞑靼军事贵族
rulingClass.en: The Tatar military aristocracy centered on the Giray royal house and the great noble clans

succession.zh: 名义上由格来家族成员继承汗位，但须获得奥斯曼苏丹认可，且常受贵族政治与宫廷斗争影响
succession.en: The throne was nominally hereditary within the Giray family, but required Ottoman confirmation and was often shaped by noble politics and court rivalry

structure.zh: 汗为最高统治者，下设卡尔盖与努尔丁两位王族副手，并依赖贝伊议政、伊斯兰法官体系与地方部族首领治理全国；奥斯曼帝国通过外交与任免权保持宗主控制
structure.en: The khan was the supreme ruler, assisted by the qalga and nureddin as princely deputies, and relied on councils of beys, Islamic judges, and local tribal leaders; the Ottoman Empire maintained suzerain control through diplomacy and influence over appointments

function.zh: 处理诏令、使节往来、文书记录、封赏与宫廷行政
function.en: Handled decrees, diplomatic correspondence, records, patronage, and court administration

name.zh: 贝伊议政与部族事务机构
name.en: Council of Beys and Tribal Affairs

function.zh: 协调贵族氏族、部族征召、司法仲裁与政治协商
function.en: Coordinated aristocratic clans, tribal levies, arbitration, and political consultation

name.zh: 伊斯兰司法与卡迪体系

function.zh: 执行沙里亚法、婚姻继承审理、契约公证与地方司法
function.en: Administered sharia, adjudicated marriage and inheritance, notarized contracts, and managed local justice

function.zh: 征收关税、贡赋、草场与农业税，并管理汗廷财库
function.en: Collected customs, tribute, pasture and agricultural taxes, and managed the khanal treasury

function.zh: 组织骑兵征召、战马调配、边防警戒与出征准备
function.en: Organized cavalry levies, horse allocation, frontier watch, and campaign preparation

localAdmin.zh: 地方治理依赖贝伊家族领地、部族营地、城镇卡迪与税吏网络；草原地区行政较为分散，定居绿洲、港口与山地社区则由地方长官和宗教法官维持秩序
localAdmin.en: Local administration relied on bey clan domains, tribal encampments, urban qadis, and tax agents; steppe administration was relatively decentralized, while settled oases, ports, and mountain communities were governed by local chiefs and religious judges

legalSystem.zh: 法律体系混合了伊斯兰沙里亚、突厥-蒙古习惯法、贵族特权与汗的敕令；涉及奴隶、贡赋、掳掠分配与部族争端时尤重习惯法与政治协商
legalSystem.en: The legal system combined Islamic sharia, Turco-Mongol customary law, aristocratic privilege, and the khan's decrees; matters involving slavery, tribute, raid shares, and tribal disputes especially depended on custom and political negotiation

taxationSystem.zh: 税收来源包括定居农业税、牲畜与草场税、贸易关税、港口征费、附属部族贡赋，以及对掳获人口与战利品的抽成；财政征收能力受地方贵族与游牧流动性限制
taxationSystem.en: Taxation drew on settled agricultural dues, livestock and pasture taxes, trade customs, port fees, tribute from subordinate groups, and shares taken from captives and war booty; fiscal extraction was limited by noble autonomy and nomadic mobility

religion.zh: 以逊尼派伊斯兰教为主，哈乃斐法学占主导，同时保留部分草原习俗；境内亦有东正教徒、亚美尼亚人、犹太人和其他少数宗教群体
religion.en: Sunni Islam predominated, with the Hanafi school dominant, while some steppe customs persisted; the khanate also contained Orthodox Christians, Armenians, Jews, and other minority communities

philosophy.zh: 政治理念结合伊斯兰君主合法性、成吉思汗系草原王权传统、贵族共治观念与对奥斯曼宗主秩序的现实承认
philosophy.en: Political thought combined Islamic legitimacy, Chinggisid steppe kingship traditions, aristocratic shared rule, and practical acceptance of Ottoman suzerain order

writingSystem.zh: 行政与文学主要使用阿拉伯字母书写的克里米亚鞑靼语和奥斯曼土耳其语；宗教与法学文本使用阿拉伯语，外交中也可见波斯语、俄语和波兰语文书
writingSystem.en: Administration and literature mainly used Crimean Tatar and Ottoman Turkish written in the Arabic script; Arabic was used for religion and law, while Persian, Russian, and Polish also appeared in diplomacy

culturalAchievements.zh: 巴赫奇萨赖宫廷建筑、清真寺与喷泉艺术、汗廷诗歌与编年史、金银工艺、马具制造，以及融合草原、奥斯曼与黑海多民族风格的宫廷文化较为突出
culturalAchievements.en: Notable achievements included the palace architecture of Bakhchisarai, mosque and fountain art, court poetry and chronicles, gold and silver craftsmanship, saddle and harness production, and a court culture blending steppe, Ottoman, and Black Sea multicultural styles

languageFamily.zh: 突厥语系，主要语言为克里米亚鞑靼语
languageFamily.en: Turkic language family, with Crimean Tatar as the principal language

gdpDescription.zh: 汗国经济规模在草原政权中较强，但结构不稳定。财富来自畜牧、农业、黑海贸易、对外军事服务及奴隶贸易，现金收入受战争、边境封锁和奥斯曼—波兰—俄国局势影响很大
gdpDescription.en: The khanate's economy was relatively strong for a steppe polity but structurally unstable. Wealth came from pastoralism, agriculture, Black Sea trade, foreign military service, and the slave trade, while cash income was highly sensitive to war, frontier closures, and Ottoman-Polish-Russian politics

mainIndustries.zh: 畜牧业、马匹繁育、谷物种植、园艺与葡萄种植、皮革加工、马具制造、盐业、黑海转口贸易、奴隶贸易
mainIndustries.en: Pastoralism, horse breeding, grain cultivation, horticulture and viticulture, leatherworking, harness manufacture, salt production, Black Sea transit trade, and the slave trade

tradeGoods.zh: 马匹、牛羊、皮革、毛皮、盐、谷物、蜂蜜、蜡、奴隶，以及输入的纺织品、金属器、火器、香料和奢侈品
tradeGoods.en: Horses, cattle and sheep, leather, furs, salt, grain, honey, wax, enslaved people, and imported textiles, metalwares, firearms, spices, and luxury goods

name.zh: 阿克切与各类金币银币并用

householdWealth.zh: 家庭财富差异极大。贵族以马群、牲畜、附庸、土地收入和掳获分成为主；普通家庭财富主要体现在牲畜、谷仓、农具和亲族网络，城镇商人则持有现金、货物与债权
householdWealth.en: Household wealth varied greatly. Nobles derived wealth from horse herds, livestock, dependents, land income, and shares of captives; ordinary households held wealth mainly in animals, grain stores, tools, and kin networks, while urban merchants possessed cash, goods, and credit claims

economicSystem.zh: 以游牧—农业混合经济为基础，辅以贵族控制的掳掠、奴隶转运和对外贸易；市场存在但国家调控有限，地方豪强和国际局势对资源流向影响极大
economicSystem.en: The economy rested on a mixed pastoral-agrarian base, supplemented by aristocratically controlled raiding, slave transit, and foreign trade; markets existed but state regulation was limited, and local magnates and international conditions strongly shaped resource flows

source.en: Tribute from subordinate tribes and districts

source.zh: 战利品、掳获分成与奴隶贸易抽成
source.en: Shares of booty, captives, and slave-trade levies

source.zh: 奥斯曼赏赐与其他杂项收入

category.en: Court, princely household, and noble patronage

category.zh: 外交、使节与对奥斯曼相关支出
宗教建筑、慈善与公共维修
category.en: Religious buildings, charity, and public maintenance

treasuryDescription.zh: 财库规模中等，可支撑短期动员与宫廷运作，但难以长期支持大规模常备军。财政相当依赖战时收益、关税与贵族合作，一旦边境受阻或战事不利，财源容易收缩
treasuryDescription.en: The treasury was moderate in size, sufficient for short-term mobilization and court operations but inadequate for sustaining a large permanent army over long periods. Finances depended heavily on wartime gains, customs revenues, and noble cooperation, and could contract quickly if frontiers were blocked or campaigns went poorly

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政政策偏重维持宫廷威望、奖赏贵族忠诚并保障快速骑兵动员；国家较少进行系统性税制改革，更依赖传统贡赋、关税和军事收益
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal policy prioritized maintaining court prestige, rewarding noble loyalty, and ensuring rapid cavalry mobilization; the state undertook little systematic tax reform and relied instead on customary tribute, customs, and military-related income

description.zh: 由汗及王族直接控制的精锐骑兵，承担护卫、突袭和战役核心任务
description.en: Elite cavalry directly controlled by the khan and princes, used for guard duty, raids, and key campaign roles

description.zh: 军力主体，机动性极强，善于侦察、远程奔袭、包抄和掳掠，但在攻坚与长期会战中较弱
description.en: The main military arm, highly mobile and effective in reconnaissance, deep raids, encirclement, and plunder, but weaker in sieges and prolonged pitched battles

description.zh: 驻守城镇、要塞与港口的步兵和火器手，数量不多，多承担防御与警备职能
description.en: Infantry and firearm troops stationed in towns, forts, and ports, limited in number and used mostly for defense and security

description.zh: 由附属部族、地方首领及临时追随者组成，用于补充边防、运输与战时支援
description.en: Formed from subordinate tribes, local chiefs, and temporary followers, used for frontier reinforcement, transport, and wartime support

commanderInChief.zh: 伊斯兰三世·格来汗

technology.zh: 军事实力以复合弓骑射、轻骑奔袭和熟练骑术为核心，辅以刀矛、少量火绳枪与轻炮；相较俄国和奥斯曼正规军，其攻城技术和火器整备较弱，但在草原机动战上仍极具威胁
technology.en: Military strength centered on composite-bow horse archery, light cavalry raiding, and expert riding, supplemented by sabers, lances, some matchlocks, and light artillery; compared with Russian and Ottoman regular forces, its siegecraft and firearms establishment were weaker, but it remained highly dangerous in steppe mobile warfare

threats.zh: 主要威胁来自北方俄国扩张、与波兰-立陶宛边境冲突、草原控制权竞争以及奥斯曼帝国对其军事服役的要求；1648年前后，乌克兰草原和东欧局势剧变也带来机会与不确定性
threats.en: Main threats came from northern Russian expansion, frontier conflict with the Polish-Lithuanian sphere, competition over steppe control, and Ottoman demands for military service; around 1648, upheaval in the Ukrainian steppe and eastern Europe also created both opportunities and uncertainty

populationDescription.zh: 人口约五十万，包括克里米亚鞑靼人为主体，另有诺盖人、希腊人、亚美尼亚人、犹太人、哥特残余、斯拉夫被掳人口及其他黑海沿岸族群；人口分布在草原营地、山地村落、农耕区与港市之间
populationDescription.en: The population was about 500,000, with Crimean Tatars forming the core, alongside Nogais, Greeks, Armenians, Jews, Gothic remnants, enslaved Slavic captives, and other Black Sea peoples; settlement was spread across steppe camps, mountain villages, farming districts, and port towns

socialClasses.zh: 上层为格来王族、贝伊与米尔扎；中间层包括宗教人士、城镇商人、手工业者和较富裕牧民；下层为普通牧民、农民、雇工与附庸群体，此外还有相当数量被贩运或役使的奴隶人口
socialClasses.en: The upper strata were the Giray princes, beys, and mirzas; the middle included religious figures, urban merchants, artisans, and prosperous pastoralists; the lower strata were ordinary herders, peasants, laborers, and dependent groups, alongside a substantial enslaved population used in trade or service

allies.zh: 主要宗主与军事合作对象为奥斯曼帝国，并视局势与诺盖诸部及东欧哥萨克势力保持临时合作
allies.en: Its principal suzerain and military partner was the Ottoman Empire, and depending on circumstances it also maintained temporary cooperation with Nogai groups and eastern European Cossack forces

enemies.zh: 主要敌对对象为俄国及其南方扩张势力，并经常与波兰-立陶宛联邦边境发生冲突；与哥萨克关系在敌对、掠夺与结盟之间反复变化
enemies.en: Its chief enemies were Muscovy and its southern expansion, and it also frequently clashed with the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth frontier; relations with the Cossacks shifted repeatedly between hostility, raiding, and alliance

foreignPolicy.zh: 外交政策以维持奥斯曼保护下的自主空间、利用草原机动优势影响东欧政治、在波兰、俄国与哥萨克之间周旋，并通过军事干预与掳掠维持汗国地位
foreignPolicy.en: Foreign policy aimed to preserve autonomous room for action under Ottoman protection, use steppe mobility to influence eastern European politics, maneuver among Poland, Muscovy, and the Cossacks, and sustain the khanate's position through military intervention and raiding

era.zh: 近世早期草原—火器过渡时代

keyInnovations.zh: 关键技术并非创新领先，而在于成熟的草原骑兵组织、马匹繁育、长程奔袭后勤、复合弓制造，以及有限吸收奥斯曼火器、城防和宫廷工艺技术
keyInnovations.en: Its key strengths were not frontier-breaking inventions but mature steppe cavalry organization, horse breeding, long-range raiding logistics, composite bow manufacture, and limited adoption of Ottoman firearms, fortification, and court craft techniques

strengths.zh: 汗国拥有优秀轻骑兵传统、广阔草原机动空间、与奥斯曼帝国相连的外交庇护、成熟的掳掠与转运网络，以及在东欧边境政治中的高影响力
strengths.en: The khanate possessed an excellent light-cavalry tradition, wide steppe maneuver space, diplomatic shelter through the Ottoman Empire, established raiding and transit networks, and significant influence in eastern European frontier politics

weaknesses.zh: 其弱点在于财政基础脆弱、对奴隶贸易与战争收益依赖过高、贵族离心力强、中央行政能力有限、火器与攻城能力相对落后，并长期受制于俄国防线加强与奥斯曼战略需要
weaknesses.en: Its weaknesses lay in a fragile fiscal base, heavy dependence on the slave trade and war income, strong aristocratic centrifugal forces, limited central administrative capacity, relatively backward firearms and siege capacity, and long-term pressure from expanding Russian defenses and Ottoman strategic demands

outlook.zh: 1648年时汗国仍然稳定且具区域影响力，并有机会借东欧大乱扩大收益与政治筹码；但从长期看，若北方定居帝国持续强化边防与火器军制，而草原掳掠经济难以转型，汗国前景将趋于不利
outlook.en: In 1648 the khanate remained stable and regionally influential, with opportunities to expand its gains and bargaining power amid turmoil in eastern Europe; in the long run, however, if northern sedentary empires continued to strengthen frontier defenses and firearm armies while the steppe raiding economy failed to adapt, the khanate's prospects would worsen

description.zh: 克里米亚汗国作为奥斯曼附庸，仍是黑海草原的重要军事与奴隶贸易力量。
description.en: As an Ottoman vassal, the Crimean Khanate remained a major military and slave-trading power on the Black Sea steppe.

ruler.zh: 阿布·阿勒-加齐·巴哈杜尔

governmentForm.zh: 以成吉思汗后裔合法性、乌兹别克部族联盟与绿洲官署相结合的世袭汗国
governmentForm.en: A hereditary khanate combining Chinggisid legitimacy, an Uzbek tribal confederative order, and oasis-based administrative offices

socialStructure.zh: 社会由成吉思汗系王族、乌兹别克部族贵族、伊斯兰宗教学者、城市商人与工匠、绿洲农民以及数量可观的奴隶与依附人口构成；草原与绿洲社会彼此交错。
socialStructure.en: Society was composed of Chinggisid royalty, Uzbek tribal nobles, Islamic religious scholars, urban merchants and artisans, oasis peasants, and a substantial slave and dependent population; steppe and oasis social worlds were closely intertwined.

rulingClass.zh: 阿拉布沙希德王族、苏丹与伊纳克等部族军政贵族，以及受尊崇的乌里玛与苏菲世系
rulingClass.en: The Arabshahid royal house, tribal military-political nobles such as sultans and inaqs, and influential ulama and Sufi lineages

succession.zh: 王位原则上由阿拉布沙希德家族内部世袭，通常在成年男性宗室之间竞争，由部族首领与宫廷精英支持后确立。
succession.en: The throne was in principle hereditary within the Arabshahid house, usually contested among adult male princes and secured through the backing of tribal chiefs and court elites.

structure.zh: 中央政权围绕汗廷运作，依赖王族成员、部族首领、财政文书官员和宗教法官共同治理；对各绿洲、灌区与部族营地实行间接控制。
structure.en: The central government revolved around the khan's court and relied on royal kinsmen, tribal chiefs, fiscal scribes, and religious judges; it exercised largely indirect control over oasis districts, irrigation zones, and tribal encampments.

name.en: Khan's Court and Royal Household Office

function.zh: 管理宫廷、接见使节、颁布命令、协调宗室与近臣事务。
function.en: Managed the court, received envoys, issued orders, and coordinated affairs of princes and close retainers.

function.zh: 征收土地税、灌溉税、关税、市场税与部族贡赋，保管库藏并分配岁入。
function.en: Collected land tax, irrigation dues, customs, market taxes, and tribal tribute; supervised the treasury and allocated annual revenue.

function.zh: 登记部族兵额、组织骑兵征发、维持边境警戒并协调对游牧部众的统御。
function.en: Registered tribal troop obligations, organized cavalry levies, maintained frontier vigilance, and coordinated authority over nomadic groups.

function.zh: 由卡迪和宗教学者处理婚姻、继承、契约和部分刑事案件，并监督宗教基金。
function.en: Handled marriage, inheritance, contracts, and some criminal cases through qadis and religious scholars, and oversaw religious endowments.

function.zh: 监管集市、度量衡、商队税与过境贸易，保障与布哈拉、里海和草原方向的商路运行。
function.en: Supervised bazaars, weights and measures, caravan duties, and transit trade, and supported routes toward Bukhara, the Caspian, and the steppe.

localAdmin.zh: 地方上由城镇总督、堡寨长官、税吏、灌溉管理人和卡迪共同治理；许多地区实际依靠地方贝伊、部族长老和宗教名流配合汗廷命令。
localAdmin.en: Locally, governance was carried out by town governors, fort commanders, tax collectors, irrigation managers, and qadis; in many areas practical administration depended on local beks, tribal elders, and religious notables cooperating with the khan's orders.

legalSystem.zh: 法律体系兼具伊斯兰沙里亚、突厥-蒙古习惯法与汗令；宗教法庭处理民事与家族事务，政治与军事案件则更多由汗廷和部族权贵裁断。
legalSystem.en: The legal system combined Islamic sharia, Turko-Mongol customary law, and khanal decrees; religious courts handled civil and family matters, while political and military cases were more often decided by the court and tribal magnates.

taxationSystem.zh: 税收以农业赋税、灌溉地租、牲畜征收、市场税、商队关税和附庸贡赋为主；在边远地区征收不稳定，常通过包税和地方中介完成。
taxationSystem.en: Taxation was based on agrarian dues, irrigation-based land revenues, livestock assessments, market taxes, caravan customs, and subordinate tribute; collection in peripheral areas was uneven and often carried out through tax farming and local intermediaries.

religion.zh: 逊尼派伊斯兰教（哈乃斐学派）为主，苏菲传统影响深厚，并保留部分草原习俗与圣裔崇敬实践。
religion.en: Sunni Islam, chiefly of the Hanafi school, predominated, with strong Sufi influence and the persistence of certain steppe customs and reverence for saintly lineages.

philosophy.zh: 政治文化强调伊斯兰君主德性、成吉思汗后裔的统治合法性、部族协商传统以及中亚波斯化宫廷文教。
philosophy.en: Political culture emphasized Islamic kingship, the legitimacy of Chinggisid descent, tribal consultation, and the Persianate courtly and learned traditions of Central Asia.

writingSystem.zh: 主要使用阿拉伯字母书写察合台突厥语与波斯语，行政、诗歌和史学文献并行发展。
writingSystem.en: The Arabic script was used chiefly for Chagatai Turkic and Persian, both of which served in administration, poetry, and historical writing.

culturalAchievements.zh: 阿布·阿勒-加齐本人以突厥语史书著称，汗国延续了中亚编年史、谱系叙事、宗教教育、手工纺织和绿洲建筑传统。
culturalAchievements.en: Abu al-Ghazi himself became known for Turkic historical writing, and the khanate sustained Central Asian traditions of chronicles, genealogical narrative, religious education, textile crafts, and oasis architecture.

languageFamily.zh: 突厥语系为主，察合台书面语与乌兹别克方言广泛使用，波斯语在高层文化和外交中亦具重要地位。
languageFamily.en: The Turkic language family predominated, with Chagatai literary language and Uzbek dialects widely used, while Persian also remained important in elite culture and diplomacy.

gdpDescription.zh: 经济以灌溉农业、畜牧、区域贸易和奴隶买卖为基础，规模不大但在下阿姆河流域具有区域枢纽作用；财富集中于绿洲、税关和贵族网络。
gdpDescription.en: The economy rested on irrigated agriculture, pastoralism, regional trade, and slave trafficking; though modest in scale, it played a regional hub role in the lower Oxus basin, with wealth concentrated in oases, customs points, and noble networks.

mainIndustries.zh: 灌溉农业、棉花种植、谷物生产、畜牧业、地毯与纺织、皮革加工、陶器、商队运输和奴隶贸易
mainIndustries.en: Irrigated farming, cotton cultivation, grain production, pastoralism, carpet and textile making, leatherworking, pottery, caravan transport, and slave trading

tradeGoods.zh: 棉布、毛织品、皮张、马匹、羊只、谷物、干果、地毯、奴隶，以及来自外部的金属器、茶、香料和奢侈纺织品
tradeGoods.en: Cotton cloth, woolens, hides, horses, sheep, grain, dried fruits, carpets, slaves, and imported metalware, tea, spices, and luxury textiles

householdWealth.zh: 多数家庭财富体现在耕地使用权、灌溉份额、牲畜、纺织工具和储粮上；城市商人和部族贵族拥有更高流动财富，奴隶则构成部分精英家产。
householdWealth.en: For most households wealth consisted of cultivation rights, irrigation shares, livestock, weaving tools, and stored grain; urban merchants and tribal nobles held greater liquid wealth, and slaves formed part of elite household property.

economicSystem.zh: 一种以绿洲农业和部族畜牧互补、由汗廷抽取税赋并依赖商队贸易连接外部市场的前近代混合经济。
economicSystem.en: A premodern mixed economy in which oasis agriculture and tribal pastoralism complemented one another, while the khanal state extracted revenues and relied on caravan trade to connect with outside markets.

source.zh: 农业土地税与灌溉收入
source.en: Agrarian land tax and irrigation revenue

source.zh: 关税、市场税与商队过境税
source.en: Customs, market taxes, and caravan transit duties
Confiscations, tax farming, and miscellaneous income

category.zh: 军队、边防与部族动员赏赐
category.en: Army, frontier defense, and rewards for tribal mobilization
Court, royal household, and support of the dynastic family
Provincial administration, justice, and revenue collection

category.zh: 宗教机构、学者与公共工程
category.en: Religious institutions, scholars, and public works

treasuryDescription.zh: 国库规模有限但足以维持短期军事动员与宫廷支出；现金、金银器、纺织品和牲畜都可作为可调动财富。
treasuryDescription.en: The treasury was limited in size but adequate for short-term military mobilization and court expenses; cash, precious metal objects, textiles, and livestock all functioned as mobilizable wealth.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政政策偏重维持王朝稳定与部族忠诚，避免过度压榨核心绿洲，同时通过贸易关税和非常征收弥补现金不足。
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal policy prioritized dynastic stability and tribal loyalty, avoided overburdening the core oases, and compensated for cash shortages through trade duties and extraordinary levies.

description.zh: 由汗直属侍从、精锐骑手和近臣武装组成，是快速反应与宫廷安全的核心力量。
description.en: Composed of the khan's retainers, elite riders, and armed household followers, this was the core force for rapid response and court security.

description.zh: 来自乌兹别克各部的主要作战力量，机动性强，但服役时间和忠诚度受部族政治影响较大。
description.en: The main fighting arm drawn from Uzbek tribes, highly mobile but strongly affected by tribal politics in service duration and reliability.

description.zh: 驻守希瓦及主要绿洲城镇，负责城墙、城门、堡寨和少量火器、轻炮操作。
description.en: Stationed in Khiva and key oasis towns, they guarded walls, gates, forts, and operated limited firearms and light artillery.

commanderInChief.zh: 阿布·阿勒-加齐·巴哈杜尔汗

technology.zh: 军事实力以骑射、长矛骑兵和绿洲堡垒防御为主，已使用火绳枪和少量火炮，但火器训练、铸炮能力和后勤组织逊于萨法维、俄国和奥斯曼等强邻。
technology.en: Military capability centered on mounted archery, lance cavalry, and oasis fortification defense; matchlocks and limited artillery were in use, but firearms training, gun founding, and logistics lagged behind stronger neighbors such as the Safavids, Russians, and Ottomans.

threats.zh: 主要威胁来自与布哈拉及草原势力的竞争、北方游牧袭扰、内部分支王族与部族叛离风险，以及逐渐增强的俄国南下压力。
threats.en: Major threats came from rivalry with Bukhara and steppe powers, northern nomadic raids, the risk of dissidence among cadet princes and tribes, and the gradually increasing southward pressure of Russia.

populationDescription.zh: 人口主要集中于下阿姆河绿洲、灌溉农区和希瓦周边城镇，另有相当数量分散于草原边缘和半定居部族区域；人口构成包括乌兹别克、突厥化居民、波斯语社群以及被掳来的奴隶人口。
populationDescription.en: The population was concentrated mainly in the lower Oxus oases, irrigated farming districts, and towns around Khiva, with a significant share dispersed along steppe margins and semi-settled tribal zones; it included Uzbeks, Turkicized inhabitants, Persian-speaking communities, and captive slave populations.

socialClasses.zh: 上层为王族、苏丹、伊纳克、贝伊和高级宗教学者；中层为商人、手工业者、小地主与城市文书；下层为农民、佃户、牧民、劳役人口和奴隶。
socialClasses.en: The upper strata consisted of royalty, sultans, inaqs, beks, and senior religious scholars; the middle strata included merchants, artisans, small landholders, and urban scribes; the lower strata were peasants, tenants, herders, laboring dependents, and slaves.

allies.zh: 汗国缺乏稳定意义上的正式盟友，更多依靠与邻近部族、商路伙伴和临时政治协商维持安全；与部分里海及草原势力保持务实往来。
allies.en: The khanate lacked stable formal allies in the strict sense, relying instead on neighboring tribes, trade partners, and temporary political understandings for security; it maintained pragmatic contacts with some Caspian and steppe powers.

enemies.zh: 主要对手是布哈拉方向的乌兹别克政权与敌对草原部族；对萨法维伊朗保持警惕，并关注俄国在伏尔加—里海地区势力增长。
enemies.en: Its principal rivals were Uzbek polities in the Bukhara direction and hostile steppe tribes; it remained wary of Safavid Iran and attentive to growing Russian power in the Volga-Caspian region.

foreignPolicy.zh: 对外政策以维持独立、控制商道、在强邻之间保持回旋空间为核心；通过使节馈赠、婚姻、贸易许可和边境劫掠相结合的方式处理对外关系。
foreignPolicy.en: Foreign policy centered on preserving independence, controlling trade routes, and maintaining room for maneuver among stronger neighbors; relations were managed through a mix of embassies, gifts, marriage ties, trade permissions, and frontier raiding.

era.zh: 近世早期

keyInnovations.zh: 关键技术并非突破式创新，而是长期成熟的绿洲灌溉工程、土坯筑城、商队运输组织、织造工艺以及有限吸收的火绳枪与轻炮技术。
keyInnovations.en: Its key technologies were less dramatic innovations than mature systems: oasis irrigation engineering, mud-brick fortification, caravan transport organization, textile production, and the limited adoption of matchlocks and light artillery.

strengths.zh: 凭借下阿姆河绿洲、商路位置和部族骑兵传统，汗国具备较强地方韧性；王朝合法性稳固，阿布·阿勒-加齐的统治提升了政治整合度。
strengths.en: The khanate possessed considerable local resilience through the lower Oxus oases, its trade position, and traditions of tribal cavalry; dynastic legitimacy was solid, and Abu al-Ghazi's rule improved political integration.

weaknesses.zh: 国家财政与官僚规模有限，对部族精英依赖过深；火器与攻城技术相对落后，内政易受宗室竞争、地方割据和商路波动影响。
weaknesses.en: State finance and bureaucracy were limited, and the regime depended heavily on tribal elites; firearms and siege capacity were relatively backward, while internal politics remained vulnerable to dynastic rivalry, local autonomy, and fluctuations in trade routes.

outlook.zh: 1648年前后汗国总体稳定，短期内有望维持独立并继续扮演中亚边缘贸易节点，但长期仍将面对布哈拉竞争、草原压力和北方帝国扩张的挑战。
outlook.en: Around 1648 the khanate was broadly stable and likely to preserve its independence in the short term while continuing as a marginal Central Asian trade node, but in the longer term it would face challenges from Bukhara, steppe pressures, and expanding northern empires.

description.zh: 希瓦汗国在阿姆河下游维持独立，并活跃于中亚草原与绿洲贸易。
description.en: The Khiva Khanate maintained independence in the lower Oxus region and was active in steppe-oasis trade.

governmentForm.zh: 以成吉思汗后裔合法性为基础的突厥-蒙古伊斯兰君主制，依赖王族、部族贵族、乌里玛与城市官僚共同治理
governmentForm.en: A Turko-Mongol Islamic monarchy grounded in Chinggisid legitimacy, governed through a combination of royal princes, tribal nobles, ulama, and urban officials

socialStructure.zh: 社会由王族与苏丹、乌兹别克部族贵族、宗教学者与苏菲教团、城市商人与手工业者、绿洲农民及游牧与半游牧社群构成；奴隶亦存在于家庭、军事和劳役领域
socialStructure.en: Society consisted of the ruling house and sultans, Uzbek tribal nobility, religious scholars and Sufi orders, urban merchants and artisans, oasis peasants, and nomadic or semi-nomadic communities; slaves also existed in domestic, military, and labor roles

rulingClass.zh: 阿斯塔尔罕王族、乌兹别克部族埃米尔、地方贝格、伊斯兰法学者与重要苏菲教团领袖
rulingClass.en: The Ashtarkhanid royal family, Uzbek tribal emirs, local begs, Islamic jurists, and leaders of major Sufi orders

succession.zh: 王位原则上在成吉思后裔的阿斯塔尔罕王族内部继承，但实际常由诸王子、部族首领与宫廷势力协商、拥立或争夺决定
succession.en: The throne was in principle inherited within the Chinggisid Ashtarkhanid house, but in practice succession was often determined by negotiation, acclamation, or rivalry among princes, tribal chiefs, and court factions

structure.zh: 中央政权围绕汗廷运作，汗为最高统治者；大臣、财政官、宗教法官和地方总督分掌行政。国家并非高度集权，而是通过对绿洲城市、灌溉区和部族联盟的层级控制维持统治
structure.en: The central government operated around the khan's court, with the khan as supreme ruler; ministers, fiscal officers, religious judges, and provincial governors handled administration. The state was not highly centralized, but ruled through layered control over oasis cities, irrigated zones, and tribal alliances

function.zh: 起草敕令、管理宫廷文书、接待使节并协调王室事务
function.en: Drafted decrees, managed court records, received envoys, and coordinated royal affairs

function.zh: 征收地税、市场税、关税及附属地区贡赋，管理国库与支出
function.en: Collected land taxes, market dues, customs, and tribute from dependent regions, and managed the treasury and expenditures

name.zh: 伊斯兰司法与宗教事务机构

function.zh: 任命卡迪、监督宗教捐产、处理伊斯兰法案件并维护逊尼派秩序
function.en: Appointed qadis, oversaw religious endowments, handled Islamic legal cases, and maintained Sunni religious order

name.zh: 地方总督与绿洲行政机构

function.zh: 管理布哈拉、撒马尔罕及其他绿洲城市的治安、灌溉、税务与征发
function.en: Managed security, irrigation, taxation, and levies in Bukhara, Samarkand, and other oasis cities

function.zh: 组织王家卫队、部族征召、边境守备并协调诸埃米尔兵力
function.en: Organized the royal guard, tribal levies, frontier garrisons, and coordinated forces supplied by emirs

localAdmin.zh: 地方行政以绿洲城市和周边灌溉农业区为中心，由总督、贝格、卡迪、税吏和地方长老共同管理；对游牧部族则更多依靠首领间的效忠与协商
localAdmin.en: Local administration centered on oasis cities and their surrounding irrigated agricultural districts, managed jointly by governors, begs, qadis, tax collectors, and local elders; nomadic tribes were governed more through loyalty and negotiation with their chiefs

legalSystem.zh: 法律体系以哈乃斐派伊斯兰法为主，辅以汗的敕令、习惯法和部族惯例；商业、婚姻、继承和宗教案件多由卡迪裁判，政治与军政事务由汗廷直接处理
legalSystem.en: The legal system was based primarily on Hanafi Islamic law, supplemented by the khan's decrees, customary law, and tribal practice; commercial, marital, inheritance, and religious cases were usually judged by qadis, while political and military affairs were handled directly by the court

taxationSystem.zh: 税收主要来自农业地税、灌溉区田赋、牲畜征收、市场税、商队通行税、关税和附庸贡赋；征税能力在不同地区差异较大，常依赖包税、地方官和部族中介
taxationSystem.en: Taxation came mainly from agricultural land tax, irrigated field assessments, livestock levies, market dues, caravan transit charges, customs, and tribute from dependencies; capacity to collect varied significantly by region and often relied on tax farming, local officials, and tribal intermediaries

religion.zh: 以逊尼派伊斯兰教为国教传统，哈乃斐学派占主导，纳克什班迪等苏菲教团在社会与政治生活中极具影响力；什叶派影响主要来自与萨法维伊朗的边境接触
religion.en: Sunni Islam formed the dominant state religious tradition, with the Hanafi school prevailing, while Sufi orders such as the Naqshbandiyya exercised major influence in social and political life; Shi'i influence was present mainly through border contact with Safavid Iran

philosophy.zh: 思想生活以伊斯兰法学、神学、波斯—中亚文人传统、苏菲修行伦理和君主赞颂文学为核心，强调正统信仰、学术权威与统治合法性
philosophy.en: Intellectual life centered on Islamic jurisprudence, theology, the Perso-Central Asian literary tradition, Sufi ethical discipline, and courtly panegyric, emphasizing orthodoxy, scholarly authority, and political legitimacy

writingSystem.zh: 主要使用阿拉伯字母书写的察合台突厥语与波斯语；行政、文学和宗教文本常见双语并行
writingSystem.en: Chagatai Turkic and Persian written in the Arabic script were the principal written languages; bilingual use was common in administration, literature, and religious texts

culturalAchievements.zh: 布哈拉与撒马尔罕仍是伊斯兰学术、经学院教育、抄本制作、史学、诗歌和建筑修缮的重要中心；虽不及帖木儿时代辉煌，但在中亚继续保持显著文化声望
culturalAchievements.en: Bukhara and Samarkand remained important centers of Islamic scholarship, madrasa education, manuscript production, historiography, poetry, and architectural restoration; though less brilliant than the Timurid age, they still retained high cultural prestige in Central Asia

languageFamily.zh: 突厥语族为统治阶层与军政的重要口语基础，伊朗语族中的波斯语则是高文化与行政语言之一
languageFamily.en: The Turkic language family formed an important spoken basis for the ruling and military elite, while Persian, from the Iranian family, remained one of the principal high-cultural and administrative languages

gdpDescription.zh: 经济以绿洲灌溉农业、区域贸易、商队服务、手工业和畜牧业为基础。总体富裕程度在内陆国家中较高，但受制于丝路衰落、地方割据倾向和跨沙漠运输成本
gdpDescription.en: The economy was based on irrigated oasis agriculture, regional trade, caravan services, handicrafts, and pastoralism. Overall prosperity was relatively strong for an inland state, but constrained by the decline of the Silk Road, tendencies toward local fragmentation, and high trans-desert transport costs

mainIndustries.zh: 小麦、大麦、棉花、葡萄和果园种植，灌溉农业，牧羊与养马，纺织、皮革、金属加工、陶器、抄本与宗教教育服务
mainIndustries.en: Cultivation of wheat, barley, cotton, grapes, and orchards, irrigated agriculture, sheep and horse raising, textiles, leatherwork, metalworking, ceramics, manuscript production, and religious educational services

tradeGoods.zh: 棉布、丝织品、皮革、地毯、干果、马匹、奴隶、染料、金属器、波斯织物、印度奢侈品与来自草原和俄国方向的皮毛与金属货品
tradeGoods.en: Cotton cloth, silk textiles, leather, carpets, dried fruits, horses, slaves, dyestuffs, metalware, Persian fabrics, Indian luxury goods, and furs and metal goods arriving from the steppe and Russian directions

householdWealth.zh: 城市商人、宗教捐产管理者和部分部族贵族拥有较高财富；普通绿洲农户多为中低水平，财富取决于灌溉水源、牲畜拥有量和税负轻重
householdWealth.en: Urban merchants, managers of religious endowments, and some tribal nobles held substantial wealth; ordinary oasis peasant households were mostly of modest means, with prosperity depending on irrigation access, livestock ownership, and tax burdens

economicSystem.zh: 国家主导有限，经济主要由地方市场、商队网络、宗教捐产土地、城市行会式手工业与部族交换体系共同构成，呈现典型前现代绿洲—草原混合经济
economicSystem.en: State direction was limited; the economy was shaped mainly by local markets, caravan networks, waqf lands, guild-like urban crafts, and tribal exchange systems, forming a characteristic premodern oasis-steppe mixed economy

source.en: Agricultural land tax and irrigated field assessments

source.zh: 市场税、关税与商队通行税
source.en: Market dues, customs, and caravan transit taxes
Confiscations, minting income, and miscellaneous revenues

category.zh: 宗教机构、经学院与捐产支持
category.en: Religious institutions, madrasas, and endowed support

category.zh: 灌溉修缮、城市维护与杂支
category.en: Irrigation repairs, urban maintenance, and miscellaneous spending

treasuryDescription.zh: 国库规模中等，足以维持宫廷和短期军事行动，但难以长期支撑大规模远征；其中一部分财富以贵金属、铸币、织物和实物储备形式保存
treasuryDescription.en: The treasury was moderate in size, sufficient to maintain the court and short-term military campaigns, but not to sustain major long-term expeditions; part of it was held in precious metals, coin, textiles, and in-kind reserves

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政政策偏保守，重视维持税基、稳定绿洲灌溉生产和保障商路收益；在政治需要时也会通过临时征发、赏赐与包税来换取部族和地方支持
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal policy was generally conservative, emphasizing maintenance of the tax base, stability of irrigated oasis production, and protection of caravan revenue; when politically necessary, extraordinary levies, stipends, and tax farming were used to secure tribal and local support

description.zh: 由汗直辖的核心骑兵与卫队，装备相对较好，承担护卫、镇压与战场突击任务
description.en: The core cavalry and guard directly controlled by the khan, relatively better equipped and used for protection, suppression, and battlefield shock action

description.zh: 由乌兹别克部族埃米尔率领的主要战力，机动性强，适合草原与半荒漠作战，但纪律和持续服役能力有限
description.en: The principal fighting force led by Uzbek tribal emirs, highly mobile and well suited to steppe and semi-desert warfare, though limited in discipline and sustained service

description.zh: 驻守城市、要塞与交通节点，负责城防、治安和支援攻城防御，多由地方征发与守备部队组成
description.en: Stationed in cities, forts, and transport nodes, responsible for urban defense, security, and support in siege warfare, largely composed of local levies and garrison troops

description.zh: 规模不大，主要用于守城和仪式性威慑，拥有火绳枪与少量火炮，技术水平逊于奥斯曼、萨法维与莫卧儿同类部队
description.en: Small in scale and used mainly for defense of fortifications and ceremonial deterrence, equipped with matchlocks and a limited number of cannon, technologically behind comparable Ottoman, Safavid, and Mughal forces

commanderInChief.zh: 阿卜杜勒阿齐兹汗

technology.zh: 军队仍以传统骑射与冷兵器骑兵为核心，火器应用存在但未彻底改变作战方式；城防炮兵和火绳枪逐渐普及，但制造与训练体系有限
technology.en: The army still relied primarily on traditional mounted archery and melee cavalry, with firearms present but not transformative; fortress artillery and matchlocks were increasingly used, but manufacturing and training systems remained limited

threats.zh: 主要威胁来自与希瓦方向的竞争、部族离心与地方叛乱，以及与萨法维伊朗在呼罗珊边境的长期紧张关系；北方草原势力与俄国扩张虽未构成直接全面战争，但潜在压力上升
threats.en: The main threats came from rivalry with Khwarazm/Khiva, centrifugal tribal politics and local revolts, and longstanding tension with Safavid Iran along the Khurasan frontier; steppe powers to the north and expanding Russia were not yet immediate full-scale threats but represented rising strategic pressure

populationDescription.zh: 人口主要集中于布哈拉、撒马尔罕及其他绿洲灌溉区，另有相当数量的游牧和半游牧社群分布于草原、荒漠边缘与季节性迁徙地带
populationDescription.en: The population was concentrated mainly in Bukhara, Samarkand, and other irrigated oasis zones, with significant nomadic and semi-nomadic communities spread across steppe, desert margins, and seasonal migration routes

socialClasses.zh: 上层为汗室、苏丹、部族埃米尔与大乌里玛；中层包括商人、地主、经学院教师、手工业者和城市官员；下层为农民、佃户、牧民、普通士兵和奴隶。城乡与游牧—定居差异比单纯财富差异更能塑造社会关系
socialClasses.en: The upper strata consisted of the khan's house, sultans, tribal emirs, and major ulama; the middle strata included merchants, landholders, madrasa teachers, artisans, and urban officials; the lower strata comprised peasants, tenants, herders, common soldiers, and slaves. Rural-urban and nomadic-sedentary distinctions shaped society as much as wealth differences did

allies.zh: 布哈拉汗国在1648年并无稳定意义上的正式大国同盟，更常依靠与地方部族、附庸城镇和阶段性友好邻邦的临时合作；与部分中亚穆斯林政权存在宗教与贸易上的联系
allies.en: In 1648 the Khanate of Bukhara had no major formal alliance in the modern sense, relying instead on temporary cooperation with local tribes, dependent towns, and occasionally friendly neighbors; it maintained religious and commercial ties with some Muslim polities of Central Asia

enemies.zh: 主要对手是希瓦方向的竞争政权，以及在呼罗珊问题上长期对立的萨法维伊朗；内部争位诸王子和不服从的部族首领也常构成准外交性质的威胁
enemies.en: Its chief rivals were the competing polity of Khiva and Safavid Iran, with which it had a long-running dispute over Khurasan; rival princes and disobedient tribal chiefs within the realm also posed quasi-diplomatic threats

foreignPolicy.zh: 外交政策以维持中亚绿洲网络主导地位、保护商路、制衡希瓦与萨法维势力、并通过宗教声望与使节往来巩固地区影响为核心
foreignPolicy.en: Foreign policy centered on maintaining primacy within the Central Asian oasis network, protecting trade routes, balancing Khiva and Safavid power, and reinforcing regional influence through religious prestige and diplomatic exchange

era.zh: 近世早期

keyInnovations.zh: 关键技术并非原创性突破，而是持续运用并改良灌溉工程、商队交通组织、铸币、经学院知识传承、抄本制作，以及有限规模的火绳枪与火炮技术
keyInnovations.en: Its key technologies were less original breakthroughs than the continued application and refinement of irrigation works, caravan transport organization, minting, madrasa-based knowledge transmission, manuscript production, and limited matchlock and artillery technology

strengths.zh: 地处中亚核心绿洲网络，拥有宗教与学术威望、较强的区域贸易中介地位、适应草原与绿洲环境的混合经济，以及在政治上仍具相当整合力
strengths.en: It occupied the core oasis network of Central Asia, possessed strong religious and scholarly prestige, held an important role as a regional trade intermediary, benefited from a mixed economy adapted to steppe and oasis environments, and still retained significant political integrative capacity

weaknesses.zh: 中央集权有限，王族内斗和部族政治削弱国家能力，财政依赖农业与过境贸易，火器和攻城技术落后于更强大的火药帝国
weaknesses.en: Centralization was limited, dynastic struggles and tribal politics weakened state capacity, finances depended heavily on agriculture and transit trade, and firearms and siege capability lagged behind stronger gunpowder empires

outlook.zh: 1648年的布哈拉汗国总体稳定，短期内仍能维持中亚强权地位，但若无法持续压制部族离心、改善财政汲取和适应区域贸易重心转移，其长期竞争力将逐步下降
outlook.en: In 1648 the Khanate of Bukhara was broadly stable and likely to remain a major Central Asian power in the short term, but unless it could restrain tribal centrifugal forces, improve fiscal extraction, and adapt to shifting regional trade patterns, its long-term competitiveness would gradually decline

description.zh: 布哈拉汗国控制中亚绿洲网络，是丝路后期区域政治中心之一。
description.en: The Khanate of Bukhara controlled major Central Asian oasis networks and remained a regional political center in the late Silk Road world.

governmentForm.zh: 伊巴德派伊斯兰神权君主制，由被推举的伊玛目统治，并结合部族协商与沿海总督行政
governmentForm.en: An Ibadi Islamic theocratic monarchy ruled by an elected imam, combining tribal consultation with coastal gubernatorial administration

socialStructure.zh: 社会由伊巴德派宗教学者、雅鲁巴统治家族与部族首领构成上层，商人和港口居民构成活跃中层，绿洲农民、渔民、水手、工匠与依附劳动者构成基层；沿海与内陆社会联系紧密但利益不尽相同
socialStructure.en: Society was headed by Ibadi religious scholars, the Yaruba ruling house, and tribal shaykhs, followed by merchants and port populations as an active middle stratum, while oasis cultivators, fishermen, sailors, artisans, and dependent laborers formed the base; coastal and interior societies were closely linked but not identical in interests

rulingClass.zh: 雅鲁巴王族、伊巴德派乌里玛、主要部族酋长及重要海港总督
rulingClass.en: The Yaruba royal house, Ibadi ulama, major tribal chiefs, and governors of key ports

succession.zh: 名义上由伊巴德派精英与部族领袖推举伊玛目，实际上雅鲁巴家族在1648年已形成强烈的世袭倾向
succession.en: In principle the imam was chosen by Ibadi elites and tribal leaders, though by 1648 the Yaruba family had established a strong hereditary tendency in practice

structure.zh: 政权以尼兹瓦的伊玛目廷政为核心，统辖内陆部族地区与马斯喀特、苏哈尔等沿海港口；治理依靠宗教合法性、部族盟约、港口税收和军事总督的结合
structure.en: The regime centered on the imam's court at Nizwa, ruling both tribal interior regions and coastal ports such as Muscat and Sohar; governance relied on a combination of religious legitimacy, tribal compacts, port taxation, and military governors

name.zh: 伊玛目廷政与咨议会议

function.zh: 制定重大政策，协调部族关系，处理继承、战争、宗教与外交问题
function.en: Set major policy, coordinated tribal relations, and handled succession, war, religion, and diplomacy

function.zh: 任命卡迪，解释伊巴德法学，裁决民事、商事与部分刑事案件，并监督宗教捐献
function.en: Appointed qadis, interpreted Ibadi jurisprudence, judged civil, commercial, and some criminal cases, and supervised religious endowments

function.zh: 管理马斯喀特、苏哈尔、苏尔等口岸，征收关税，监督航运、仓储和外国商人活动
function.en: Managed ports such as Muscat, Sohar, and Sur, collected customs dues, and supervised shipping, warehousing, and foreign merchants

function.zh: 征收天课、贸易税、绿洲农业税与附属地区贡赋，分配军费和地方开支
function.en: Collected zakat, trade duties, oasis agricultural taxes, and tribute from subordinate districts, and allocated military and local expenditures

function.zh: 建造和维护战船，组织沿海防务，保护商路，并对葡萄牙据点发动远征
function.en: Built and maintained warships, organized coastal defense, protected trade routes, and launched expeditions against Portuguese positions

function.zh: 驻守重要城镇和堡垒，管理地方治安、粮储、征税与部族协调
function.en: Garrisoned key towns and forts, managing local security, grain stores, taxation, and tribal coordination

localAdmin.zh: 地方治理依赖瓦利、堡垒指挥官、部族酋长与卡迪共同运作。内陆绿洲城镇保留较强自治传统，沿海港口则受中央控制更直接。
localAdmin.en: Local administration operated through walis, fort commanders, tribal shaykhs, and qadis. Interior oasis towns retained strong traditions of autonomy, while coastal ports were more directly controlled by the center.

legalSystem.zh: 法律以伊巴德派伊斯兰法为基础，并结合部族习惯法、商贸惯例与统治者敕令。港口商业纠纷通常由卡迪、商人证词和地方官员共同裁断。
legalSystem.en: The legal system was grounded in Ibadi Islamic law, combined with tribal customary law, mercantile practice, and rulings of the ruler. Commercial disputes in ports were commonly resolved through qadis, merchant testimony, and local officials.

taxationSystem.zh: 财政收入主要来自海关税、天课、农业出产征收、渔业和珍珠收益、港口收费及附属城镇贡赋。与纯土地税国家相比，阿曼对海上贸易收入依赖尤深。
taxationSystem.en: Revenue came chiefly from customs duties, zakat, agricultural assessments, fisheries and pearling income, port fees, and tribute from subordinate towns. Compared with purely land-tax states, Oman depended especially heavily on maritime trade revenue.

religion.zh: 国教为伊巴德派伊斯兰教，同时沿海地区也有逊尼派、什叶派与外来商人社群；宗教认同是雅鲁巴政权动员反葡斗争的重要基础
religion.en: The state religion was Ibadi Islam, though Sunni, Shi'i, and foreign merchant communities were also present along the coast; religious identity was a major basis for Yarubid mobilization against the Portuguese

philosophy.zh: 政治思想以伊巴德派的公正统治、社群协商、宗教道德与合法伊玛目观念为核心，同时兼具务实的海贸经营与部族平衡传统
philosophy.en: Political thought centered on Ibadi ideas of just rule, communal consultation, religious morality, and the legitimacy of the imam, while also reflecting pragmatic traditions of maritime commerce and tribal balancing

writingSystem.zh: 使用阿拉伯字母书写阿拉伯语，宗教、法律、商贸账册与官方文书均以阿拉伯文为主
writingSystem.en: Arabic written in the Arabic script was used for religion, law, mercantile account books, and official documents

culturalAchievements.zh: 1648年前后的阿曼文化成就主要体现在堡垒建筑、清真寺修缮、宗教学术、航海知识积累以及将内陆伊巴德传统与印度洋港口文化相结合。雅鲁巴时期还推动了灌溉系统、城防与造船业的发展。
culturalAchievements.en: Omani cultural achievements around 1648 were seen especially in fort architecture, mosque patronage, religious scholarship, navigational knowledge, and the fusion of interior Ibadi traditions with Indian Ocean port culture. The Yarubid period also encouraged irrigation works, urban defenses, and shipbuilding.

languageFamily.zh: 闪米特语系阿拉伯语支，辅以地方阿拉伯方言和部分俾路支、斯瓦希里及波斯商贸用语影响
languageFamily.en: Semitic, specifically Arabic, with local Arabic dialects supplemented by some Baluchi, Swahili, and Persian mercantile influences

gdpDescription.zh: 阿曼经济规模对大帝国而言不算庞大，但以人口规模衡量相当活跃。其繁荣来自绿洲农业、椰枣与畜牧、沿海渔业、珍珠和海运贸易，尤其是收复沿海后迅速扩大的印度洋商业与海关收入。
gdpDescription.en: The Omani economy was not large by imperial standards, but it was highly active relative to its population. Its prosperity rested on oasis agriculture, dates and pastoralism, coastal fisheries, pearls, and seaborne trade, especially the expanding Indian Ocean commerce and customs income that followed the recovery of the coast.

mainIndustries.zh: 绿洲农业、椰枣种植、乳香与地方香料贸易、渔业、珍珠采集、铜与手工业、造船、海运和转口贸易
mainIndustries.en: Oasis agriculture, date cultivation, frankincense and regional aromatics trade, fisheries, pearling, copper and crafts, shipbuilding, shipping, and entrepot trade

tradeGoods.zh: 出口椰枣、马匹、鱼干、珍珠、铜、阿曼船只运载服务与部分乳香；进口纺织品、香料、咖啡、木材、金属制品、火器、米粮及印度洋奢侈品
tradeGoods.en: Exports included dates, horses, dried fish, pearls, copper, Omani shipping services, and some frankincense; imports included textiles, spices, coffee, timber, metal goods, firearms, rice, and Indian Ocean luxury products

name.zh: 里亚尔与通行外来银币
name.en: Riyal and circulating foreign silver coin

householdWealth.zh: 家庭财富差异显著。内陆农户以椰枣园、水权和牲畜为主要资产；沿海商人则以船舶、仓储、奴仆与货物周转积累财富。整体生活水平高于许多干旱地区，但仍受旱灾与海贸波动影响。
householdWealth.en: Household wealth varied greatly. Interior farming households held date groves, water rights, and livestock as principal assets, while coastal merchants accumulated wealth through ships, storage, servants, and commercial turnover. Overall living standards were stronger than in many arid regions, though still vulnerable to drought and fluctuations in maritime trade.

economicSystem.zh: 经济体制为以市场交换和港口贸易为导向的前近代混合经济。国家并不全面控制生产，但通过海关、港口、船队和军事保护深度影响商业流向。
economicSystem.en: The economy was a premodern mixed system oriented toward market exchange and port trade. The state did not comprehensively control production, but strongly shaped commerce through customs, ports, fleets, and military protection.

source.en: Tribute from subordinate ports and districts

category.zh: 造船、港口维护与公共工程
category.en: Shipbuilding, port maintenance, and public works

treasuryDescription.zh: 国库因收复沿海与扩张海贸而趋于充实，但财政流动性仍取决于港口税和战争缴获。财富部分以银币、金饰、军需品、粮储和可征调船只形式存在。
treasuryDescription.en: The treasury had grown stronger due to the recovery of the coast and expanding maritime trade, but fiscal liquidity still depended on customs receipts and wartime captures. Wealth existed partly as silver coin, gold ornaments, military stores, grain reserves, and requisitionable vessels.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政政策偏向以海关和贡赋支持军事扩张，在保持宗教正当性的同时避免过重直接征敛，以维系部族与商人合作。
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal policy favored using customs and tribute to support military expansion while avoiding overly heavy direct exactions, thereby preserving religious legitimacy and cooperation with tribes and merchants.

name.zh: 陆上部族步兵与火绳枪兵
name.en: Land tribal infantry and matchlock men

description.zh: 主要由内陆部族与城镇守军组成，装备长矛、刀剑、盾牌和一定数量火绳枪，擅长山地、绿洲和堡垒作战
description.en: Drawn mainly from interior tribes and town garrisons, equipped with spears, swords, shields, and some matchlocks, and effective in mountain, oasis, and fortress warfare

description.zh: 由战船船员、水手、炮手和登船战士构成，是雅鲁巴政权崛起的核心力量，用于围攻葡萄牙据点并护卫商路
description.en: Composed of warship crews, sailors, gunners, and boarding fighters, this was the core force behind Yarubid expansion, used against Portuguese strongholds and to escort trade routes

description.zh: 守备沿海和内陆要塞，配备中小型火炮，负责防御、警戒和控制交通节点
description.en: Stationed in coastal and interior forts, equipped with small and medium artillery, and responsible for defense, surveillance, and control of communication nodes

name.zh: 部族后备与骑乘侦察队

description.zh: 战时由部族动员，承担侦察、急袭、护送和地区防御任务
description.en: Mobilized from tribes in wartime, serving in reconnaissance, raids, convoy escort, and regional defense

commanderInChief.zh: 伊玛目苏丹·本·赛义夫

technology.zh: 军事技术处于早期近代区域强国水准，广泛使用火绳枪、前装火炮、海上帆桨战船和石砌堡垒体系。尽管火器生产有限，但能通过贸易和缴获补充装备。
technology.en: Military technology stood at the level of a strong regional early modern power, using matchlocks, muzzle-loading artillery, sailing-oared warships, and a masonry fort network. Though domestic firearms production was limited, equipment could be supplemented through trade and capture.

threats.zh: 主要威胁来自葡萄牙在印度洋残余据点及其海上反击；此外还需警惕波斯湾竞争者、阿拉伯半岛内部部族叛乱和对新占港口控制不稳。
threats.en: The principal threat came from remaining Portuguese positions in the Indian Ocean and their possible naval counterattacks; additional concerns included Gulf rivals, tribal revolts within Arabia, and insecure control over newly won ports.

populationDescription.zh: 人口主要集中于北阿曼山地与绿洲带、巴提奈沿海平原以及若干港口城镇。人口密度受水源限制，内陆绿洲和海港构成最重要聚居点。
populationDescription.en: The population was concentrated mainly in northern Oman's mountains and oasis belt, the Batinah coastal plain, and a number of port towns. Population density was constrained by water availability, making interior oases and seaports the principal centers of settlement.

socialClasses.zh: 主要阶层包括伊玛目与王族、乌里玛和卡迪、部族酋长、海商与船主、城市工匠与小商人、绿洲农民、渔民、牧民以及家内奴仆和依附劳工。海港社会通常比内陆更具流动性和多族群特征。
socialClasses.en: Major social strata included the imam and royal house, ulama and qadis, tribal chiefs, maritime merchants and shipowners, urban artisans and petty traders, oasis cultivators, fishermen, pastoralists, and household slaves and dependent laborers. Port society was generally more fluid and multiethnic than the interior.

allies.zh: 阿曼在1648年并无稳定意义上的正式大国盟友，但与部分反葡地方势力、印度洋穆斯林商人网络及东非、阿拉伯海若干港口保持合作关系
allies.en: In 1648 Oman had no fixed major-power allies in the formal sense, but maintained cooperative ties with some anti-Portuguese local forces, Muslim merchant networks of the Indian Ocean, and several ports in East Africa and the Arabian Sea

enemies.zh: 主要敌人为布拉干萨葡萄牙及其在马斯喀特以外的海上据点；同时与部分波斯湾沿岸势力和阿拉伯半岛内部敌对部族存在摩擦
enemies.en: Its main enemy was Braganza Portugal and its maritime strongholds beyond Muscat; friction also existed with some Gulf littoral powers and hostile tribes within Arabia

foreignPolicy.zh: 对外政策以驱逐葡萄牙势力、控制阿曼沿海、保障印度洋航路和拓展东非与海湾影响力为核心，兼具宗教正当性与商业现实主义。
foreignPolicy.en: Foreign policy focused on expelling Portuguese power, securing the Omani coast, protecting Indian Ocean sea lanes, and extending influence into East Africa and the Gulf, combining religious legitimacy with commercial realism.

era.zh: 近代早期

keyInnovations.zh: 关键能力不在抽象发明而在应用：阿曼人熟练掌握远洋航海、季风航线、战船建造、港口堡垒体系、火绳枪和前装火炮使用，以及法拉吉灌溉系统维护。雅鲁巴政权尤其擅长把海军、堡垒与商贸网络整合为国家力量。
keyInnovations.en: Its key strengths lay less in abstract invention than in application: Omanis were proficient in blue-water navigation, monsoon routing, warship construction, port-fortification systems, the use of matchlocks and muzzle-loading artillery, and the maintenance of falaj irrigation systems. The Yarubid regime was especially adept at integrating navy, forts, and trade networks into state power.

strengths.zh: 阿曼的优势在于强烈的伊巴德宗教凝聚力、成功的反葡战争、活跃的海贸网络、善于动员的部族结构以及连接内陆绿洲与海港的复合政体。人口虽少，但战略位置极佳。
strengths.en: Oman's strengths lay in strong Ibadi religious cohesion, successful anti-Portuguese warfare, active maritime trade networks, a mobilizable tribal structure, and a composite polity linking interior oases with seaports. Its population was small, but its strategic position was excellent.

weaknesses.zh: 弱点在于人口与资源基数有限，对港口税和海贸高度依赖，部族政治容易引发分裂，继承制度在选举与世袭之间存在张力，且难以长期与更大帝国进行消耗战。
weaknesses.en: Weaknesses included a limited demographic and resource base, heavy dependence on customs and maritime trade, a tribal political order prone to fragmentation, tension between elective and hereditary succession, and difficulty sustaining prolonged wars against much larger empires.

outlook.zh: 1648年的前景总体乐观。若雅鲁巴统治者继续维持部族团结、巩固海军并利用葡萄牙在印度洋的衰退，阿曼有望在未来数十年成长为西印度洋的重要海上强权；但内部继承冲突始终可能削弱其成果。
outlook.en: The outlook in 1648 was broadly favorable. If the Yarubid rulers could preserve tribal unity, strengthen the navy, and exploit Portuguese decline in the Indian Ocean, Oman was well placed to become a major western Indian Ocean maritime power in the coming decades; yet internal succession conflict always threatened to undermine these gains.

description.zh: 阿曼雅鲁巴政权驱逐葡萄牙势力后，逐步发展为印度洋海上强权。
description.en: After expelling Portuguese influence, the Yarubid Omani state was emerging as a maritime power in the Indian Ocean.

governmentForm.zh: 扎伊迪什叶派伊斯兰神权伊玛目制君主政体，结合宗教合法性、部族协商与王朝家族统治
governmentForm.en: A Zaydi Shi'i Islamic theocratic imamate combining religious legitimacy, tribal consultation, and dynastic family rule

socialStructure.zh: 社会由赛义德宗教贵族、卡迪与乌里玛、部族首领、城镇商人和手工业者、农民与佃户，以及数量有限的奴隶与仆役组成；高地部族社会与城市宗教学术阶层共同塑造政治秩序
socialStructure.en: Society was composed of sayyid religious elites, qadis and ulama, tribal shaykhs, urban merchants and artisans, peasants and sharecroppers, and a limited population of slaves and servants; Highland tribal society and urban religious-scholarly circles jointly shaped political order

rulingClass.zh: 卡西米家族的赛义德统治集团、扎伊迪法学家、主要高地部族首领与萨那等城市显贵
rulingClass.en: The ruling stratum consisted of the Qasimid sayyid dynasty, Zaydi jurists, major Highland tribal shaykhs, and urban notables of centers such as Sanaa

succession.zh: 名义上伊玛目应由具备宗教资历、出身哈桑或侯赛因后裔者通过宣示与拥护产生，但1648年时实际上已高度王朝化，由卡西米家族内部继承并经宗教与部族精英承认
succession.en: In principle the imam was to be proclaimed from among qualified descendants of Hasan or Husayn, but by 1648 succession had become strongly dynastic in practice within the Qasimid family, subject to recognition by religious and tribal elites

structure.zh: 中央政权以伊玛目为核心，依靠家族总督、财政征收官、宗教法官和地方部族盟约治理；政权行政整合度不如大型官僚帝国，但在也门高地具有较强动员和裁判能力
structure.en: The central regime revolved around the imam and governed through family governors, fiscal collectors, religious judges, and agreements with local tribes; administrative integration was looser than in large bureaucratic empires, yet it possessed strong mobilizing and judicial capacity in the Yemeni Highlands

name.zh: 伊玛目宫廷与最高咨议机构
name.en: Imamic Court and Supreme Consultative Council

function.zh: 处理最高政务、任命、外交、军政协调与宗教合法性事务
function.en: Handled supreme governance, appointments, diplomacy, military-political coordination, and matters of religious legitimacy

function.zh: 征收地税、天课、关税、咖啡贸易税及管理国库与仓储
function.en: Collected land taxes, zakat, customs, coffee duties, and managed the treasury and stores

name.zh: 卡迪司法与宗教事务机构
name.en: Qadi Judiciary and Religious Affairs Administration

function.zh: 依扎伊迪法学裁判民事、财产、婚姻和宗教案件，并监督清真寺与宗教学术网络
function.en: Administered civil, property, marital, and religious cases under Zaydi jurisprudence, and oversaw mosques and scholarly networks

name.zh: 地方总督与堡寨管理体系

function.zh: 管理萨那周边、高地山城、梯田农业区与战略堡寨，维持治安与征发
function.en: Administered Sanaa's hinterland, Highland mountain towns, terraced agricultural zones, and strategic forts, maintaining order and mobilization

name.zh: 港口与红海贸易监管机构
name.en: Port and Red Sea Trade Supervision Office

function.zh: 监管摩卡等港口的商税、航运、仓储与对外商人往来
function.en: Supervised customs, shipping, warehousing, and dealings with foreign merchants at ports such as Mocha

localAdmin.zh: 地方行政依靠总督、卡迪、税吏、堡寨守将与部族首领共同运作。山区部族地区多通过盟约和贡赋维持服从，城市与农耕核心区则由任命官员直接控制更强
localAdmin.en: Local administration functioned through governors, qadis, tax officials, fortress commanders, and tribal shaykhs. In mountain tribal areas obedience was often maintained through compacts and tribute, while cities and core agricultural zones were more directly controlled by appointed officials

legalSystem.zh: 法律体系以扎伊迪伊斯兰法为核心，结合伊玛目诏令、法学家解释、习惯法与部族调解。涉及部族纠纷时，实践中常见伊斯兰法与地方习惯并行
legalSystem.en: The legal system centered on Zaydi Islamic law, supplemented by imamic decrees, juristic interpretation, customary law, and tribal mediation. In tribal disputes, Islamic law often operated alongside local custom in practice

taxationSystem.zh: 财政来源包括农业地租与赋税、天课、市场税、道路与港口关税，以及对咖啡出口和转口贸易的征收。税负在山区农业社会中偏重实物与地区性征敛，港口则以货币税收较为重要
taxationSystem.en: Fiscal revenue came from agricultural rents and taxes, zakat, market dues, road and port customs, and levies on coffee exports and transit trade. In the Highland agrarian economy burdens often fell in kind and through regional exactions, while ports were more important sources of cash revenue

religion.zh: 国教和主导信仰为扎伊迪派什叶伊斯兰，同时沿海与低地存在逊尼派社群，犹太社群亦在也门城镇和手工业中占有一席之地
religion.en: The dominant religion was Zaydi Shi'i Islam, while Sunni communities existed in coastal and lowland regions, and Jewish communities also held a place in Yemeni towns and crafts

philosophy.zh: 思想以扎伊迪神学、伊斯兰法学、阿拉伯语文献学与敬虔政治伦理为核心，强调伊玛目应具备宗教知识、正义与维护共同体秩序的责任
philosophy.en: Intellectual life centered on Zaydi theology, Islamic jurisprudence, Arabic philology, and a pious political ethic emphasizing the imam's duty to possess religious knowledge, justice, and responsibility for communal order

writingSystem.zh: 使用阿拉伯字母书写阿拉伯语，宗教、司法、贸易和官方文书均以阿拉伯文为主
writingSystem.en: Arabic was written in the Arabic script, and religious, judicial, commercial, and official documentation was primarily in Arabic

culturalAchievements.zh: 17世纪也门以扎伊迪学术著述、清真寺教育网络、山地建筑、梯田农业景观和摩卡咖啡贸易闻名。萨那及高地城镇保留精美多层砖石住宅与浓厚的书写文化
culturalAchievements.en: Seventeenth-century Yemen was noted for Zaydi scholarly writing, mosque-based educational networks, mountain architecture, terraced agricultural landscapes, and the Mocha coffee trade. Sanaa and Highland towns preserved striking multi-story masonry houses and a strong manuscript culture

languageFamily.zh: 主体语言属闪米特语系阿拉伯语支，日常使用也门阿拉伯语诸方言，宗教和学术使用古典阿拉伯语
languageFamily.en: The primary language belonged to the Semitic Arabic branch; everyday speech used Yemeni Arabic dialects, while religion and scholarship employed Classical Arabic

gdpDescription.zh: 经济以高地梯田农业、畜牧、地方手工业与红海—印度洋贸易节点功能为基础。也门在17世纪中叶因咖啡出口而获得显著现金收入，但整体仍是以农村生产和区域交换为主的中等规模经济
gdpDescription.en: The economy rested on Highland terraced agriculture, pastoralism, local handicrafts, and the country's role as a Red Sea–Indian Ocean trade node. By the mid-seventeenth century Yemen gained substantial cash income from coffee exports, though it remained overall a medium-scale economy based chiefly on rural production and regional exchange

mainIndustries.zh: 咖啡种植与出口、谷物与高粱农业、果园与香料作物、畜牧、纺织、皮革、金属与日用手工业、港口仓储与转口贸易
mainIndustries.en: Coffee cultivation and export, grain and sorghum agriculture, orchard and spice crops, pastoralism, textiles, leatherwork, metal and everyday crafts, and port warehousing and entrepot trade

tradeGoods.zh: 出口咖啡、皮革、染料、少量乳香没药及区域农产品；进口纺织品、金属制品、香料、印度洋奢侈品、武器、部分粮食与银币
tradeGoods.en: Exports included coffee, leather, dyes, limited frankincense and myrrh, and regional agricultural products; imports included textiles, metal goods, spices, Indian Ocean luxuries, arms, some grain, and silver coin

name.zh: 里亚尔与马赫拉菲混合货币体系
name.en: Riyal and mahallafi mixed currency system

householdWealth.zh: 家庭财富差异显著。高地农户普遍拥有有限土地、梯田使用权、牲畜和谷物储备；城市商人和税务承包者积累较多银币、库存和跨红海商业联系；宗教显贵与部族领袖控制土地、租赋和政治资源
householdWealth.en: Household wealth varied considerably. Highland peasants typically held limited land, terrace-use rights, livestock, and grain stores; urban merchants and tax contractors accumulated more silver, inventories, and Red Sea commercial ties; religious notables and tribal leaders controlled land, rents, and political resources

unit.en: silver riyals per person per year

economicSystem.zh: 经济制度属于农业税收国家与商贸节点相结合的前近代混合经济。农村以家庭生产、租佃和部族社会关系为基础，国家通过港口关税和咖啡贸易取得现金化收入
economicSystem.en: The economic system was a premodern mixed economy combining an agrarian tax state with a commercial entrepot. Rural life rested on household production, tenancy, and tribal social relations, while the state derived monetized income from port customs and the coffee trade

source.zh: 天课、宗教性征收与市场税
source.en: Zakat, religious levies, and market dues

source.zh: 附庸贡赋、罚金与杂项收入

category.en: Army, fortresses, and tribal military payments

category.zh: 宫廷、宗教机构与学者供养
category.en: Court, religious institutions, and scholarly support

treasuryDescription.zh: 国库在1648年前后处于相对稳健状态，受益于高地整合与咖啡贸易现金流。其储备并非高度制度化的近代国家财政基金，而是由银币、实物仓储、港口税收预期及地方可动员资源共同构成
treasuryDescription.en: The treasury around 1648 was in a relatively sound condition, benefiting from Highland consolidation and coffee-trade cash flow. Its reserves were not a highly institutionalized modern fiscal fund, but rather a combination of silver coin, in-kind stores, expected port revenue, and locally mobilizable resources

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政政策重在维持高地秩序、确保部族效忠、掌握贸易税源并避免过度征敛破坏山区生产。国家尤其重视摩卡港及相关商路的可持续税收
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal policy focused on preserving Highland order, securing tribal loyalty, controlling taxable commerce, and avoiding excessive extraction that might damage mountain production. The state paid particular attention to the sustainable revenues of Mocha and related trade routes

name.zh: 伊玛目近卫与常备步兵

description.zh: 由宫廷卫队、驻城部队与核心火器步兵组成，负责保卫萨那、关键堡寨及执行中央命令
description.en: Composed of court guards, garrison troops, and core firearm infantry tasked with defending Sanaa, key forts, and enforcing central orders

description.zh: 由高地部族在战时按盟约提供的战士组成，熟悉山地作战，机动强但持续服役能力有限
description.en: Formed by Highland tribal warriors supplied in wartime under alliance obligations; they were effective in mountain warfare and mobile, but limited in sustained service

description.zh: 数量不大，主要承担侦察、联络、护送和对山地交通线的快速反应任务
description.en: Not numerous, they mainly served reconnaissance, communications, escort, and rapid response on mountain routes

description.zh: 驻守战略城堡和港口，装备火炮与火绳枪，负责防御叛乱、海岸袭扰和要道控制
description.en: Stationed in strategic fortresses and ports, equipped with artillery and matchlocks, and responsible for guarding against revolt, coastal raids, and control of key routes

commanderInChief.zh: 穆塔瓦基勒·伊斯玛仪伊玛目

technology.zh: 军队技术属早期近代水平，普遍使用火绳枪、冷兵器、山地堡垒和有限火炮。作战优势更多来自地形、部族动员和要塞体系，而非大规模操典化常备军
technology.en: Military technology was of an early modern level, with widespread use of matchlocks, edged weapons, mountain fortresses, and limited artillery. Combat advantages came more from terrain, tribal mobilization, and fortification networks than from a large drill-based standing army

threats.zh: 主要威胁包括高地内部部族叛离、沿海与低地地区控制不稳、与奥斯曼势力遗留影响相关的权力竞争，以及红海和阿拉伯海商路上来自阿曼及其他海上力量的间接压力
threats.en: Main threats included internal tribal defections in the Highlands, unstable control over coastal and lowland districts, power competition linked to lingering Ottoman influence, and indirect pressure from Oman and other maritime forces on Red Sea and Arabian Sea trade routes

populationDescription.zh: 人口主要集中于也门高地的梯田农业区、山间城镇和宗教中心，沿海提哈马平原与主要港口人口较少但商业重要。整体人口密度受地形、灌溉和粮食生产能力强烈制约
populationDescription.en: The population was concentrated chiefly in the terraced agricultural districts, mountain towns, and religious centers of the Yemeni Highlands, while the Tihama coastal plain and major ports were less populated but commercially important. Overall density was strongly constrained by terrain, irrigation, and food-production capacity

socialClasses.zh: 上层为赛义德家族、宗教学者、法官与主要部族领袖；中层为商人、地主、军官、手工业者与较富裕农户；下层为一般农民、佃户、劳工、仆役及少量奴隶。犹太工匠和商人是若干城镇经济的重要组成部分
socialClasses.en: The upper stratum included sayyid families, religious scholars, judges, and major tribal shaykhs; the middle included merchants, landholders, officers, artisans, and better-off peasants; the lower included ordinary peasants, tenants, laborers, servants, and a small number of slaves. Jewish artisans and merchants formed an important part of several urban economies

allies.zh: 无稳定意义上的正式大国同盟；更常见的是与红海和印度洋商人网络、地方部族盟约及临时性的区域合作关系
allies.en: There were no stable formal great-power alliances; more typical were ties through Red Sea and Indian Ocean merchant networks, local tribal compacts, and temporary regional arrangements

enemies.zh: 无单一持续全面战争敌国，但与奥斯曼势力残余影响、部分沿海地方势力及阿曼海上竞争者存在紧张关系
enemies.en: There was no single permanent all-out wartime enemy, but tensions existed with remnants of Ottoman influence, some coastal local powers, and Omani maritime competitors

foreignPolicy.zh: 对外政策以维护高地主权、控制港口税源、保障咖啡贸易、限制外来帝国重新干涉也门为核心。对外商通常采取务实开放态度，只要其贸易有利于税收和政治稳定
foreignPolicy.en: Foreign policy centered on preserving Highland sovereignty, controlling port revenues, securing the coffee trade, and preventing renewed outside imperial intervention in Yemen. Foreign merchants were generally treated with pragmatic openness so long as their trade supported revenue and political stability

era.zh: 早期近代

keyInnovations.zh: 关键技术与实践包括山地梯田灌溉与蓄水工程、适应高地环境的建筑技术、阿拉伯文手抄本学术生产、港口仓储与长距离商贸组织，以及火绳枪和堡寨防御体系的普及
keyInnovations.en: Key technologies and practices included terraced irrigation and water-storage engineering, building techniques adapted to Highland environments, Arabic manuscript scholarship, port warehousing and long-distance commercial organization, and the spread of matchlocks and fortress defense systems

strengths.zh: 国家优势在于高地地形易守难攻、扎伊迪宗教合法性强、卡西米家族统治较稳固、部族动员能力强，以及摩卡咖啡和红海贸易带来的现金收入
strengths.en: Its strengths lay in defensible Highland terrain, strong Zaydi religious legitimacy, relatively secure Qasimid rule, robust tribal mobilization, and cash income from Mocha coffee and Red Sea trade

weaknesses.zh: 弱点在于行政整合有限、对部族妥协依赖较深、沿海控制并不总是稳固、财政对贸易税收较敏感，且难以维持如大帝国般规模化常备官僚与军队
weaknesses.en: Weaknesses included limited administrative integration, deep reliance on tribal compromise, not always secure control of the coast, fiscal sensitivity to trade revenues, and difficulty maintaining large imperial-style standing bureaucracies and armies

outlook.zh: 1648年时前景总体稳定且偏向乐观。若能继续维持高地团结、控制摩卡港并平衡部族与宗教学者利益，伊玛目国可在17世纪后期继续成为阿拉伯半岛西南部的重要区域强权；但若贸易受扰或内部继承争议加剧，稳定性将明显下降
