technology.en: Based on stone, wood, and bone weapons with bows; no metal smelting.

unit.en: grams of silver equivalent per year

threats.zh: 西班牙殖民敌意。
threats.en: Spanish colonial hostility.

populationDescription.zh: 中美洲加勒比海岸。
populationDescription.en: Central American Caribbean coast.

socialClasses.zh: 首领家族、长老、自由成员、依附者。
socialClasses.en: Chiefly families, elders, free members, dependents.

allies.zh: 无固定盟国，依赖亲缘和交换伙伴形成临时联盟。
allies.en: No fixed allies; temporary alliances formed through kin ties and exchange partners.

enemies.zh: 无持久性敌国，但邻近群体间常有资源争夺。
enemies.en: No permanent enemies, though resource competition with neighboring groups was common.

foreignPolicy.zh: 以维护领地安全与交换关系为先。
foreignPolicy.en: Policy prioritized territorial security and exchange relationships.

era.zh: 新石器至早期部族阶段

keyInnovations.zh: 火器和航海技术（英国提供）。
keyInnovations.en: Firearms and navigation (British-supplied).

strengths.zh: 英国盟友提供保护和贸易。
strengths.en: British alliance provided protection and trade.

weaknesses.zh: 人口少，依赖英国。
weaknesses.en: Small population, dependent on Britain.

outlook.zh: 将持续至19世纪。
outlook.en: Would persist into the 19th century.

description.zh: 1648年米斯基托王国，以英国为盟友的中美洲海岸政体。
description.en: The Miskito Kingdom in 1648, a Central American coastal polity allied with Britain.

governmentForm.zh: 母系继承制的班图王权国家，国王由贵族选举产生
governmentForm.en: A matrilineal Bantu monarchy with a king elected by nobles

socialStructure.zh: 社会由王族、省级首领、大西洋贸易商人、工匠、渔民、农民和大量奴隶构成。奴隶贸易正深刻改变社会结构。
socialStructure.en: Society consisted of royalty, provincial chiefs, Atlantic trade merchants, artisans, fishermen, farmers, and a growing slave population. The slave trade was profoundly reshaping social structures.

rulingClass.zh: 马洛安果王族、省级马福克、与欧洲人交易的商贾精英
rulingClass.en: The Ma Loango royalty, provincial mafouks, and merchant elites trading with Europeans

succession.zh: 国王从母系王族中由贵族议事会选举产生。
succession.en: The king was elected from the matrilineal royal lineage by the nobles' council.

structure.zh: 中央以马洛安果宫廷为核心，省级由马福克管理。大西洋贸易带来的财富正在重塑权力格局。
structure.en: The center was the Ma Loango's court, with provinces managed by mafouks. Wealth from Atlantic trade was reshaping power dynamics.

function.zh: 最高治理与仲裁机构。
function.en: Supreme governance and arbitration body.

function.zh: 管理大西洋贸易、关税和欧洲商人接洽。
function.en: Managed Atlantic trade, customs, and European merchant contacts.

function.zh: 协调省级贡赋和行政。
function.en: Coordinated provincial tribute and administration.

localAdmin.zh: 省级由马福克管理，村社由氏族长老维持秩序。大西洋贸易商人在沿海地区拥有越来越大的影响力。
localAdmin.en: Provinces were managed by mafouks, with village order maintained by clan elders. Atlantic trade merchants wielded growing influence in coastal areas.

legalSystem.zh: 洛安果习惯法为主，酋长和长老裁决争端。
legalSystem.en: Loango customary law predominated, with chiefs and elders adjudicating disputes.

taxationSystem.zh: 以贸易关税、农业贡赋和劳役为主。大西洋贸易税成为最大收入来源。
taxationSystem.en: Revenue came from trade customs, agricultural tribute, and labor obligations. Atlantic trade duties had become the largest revenue source.

religion.zh: 班图传统宗教（恩基西信仰），基督教通过葡萄牙接触有限传入
religion.en: Bantu traditional religion (nkisi beliefs), with limited Christianity filtering in through Portuguese contact

culturalAchievements.zh: 拉菲亚布纺织、木雕、铜铸工艺继续发展。洛安果因高品质拉菲亚织品在欧洲市场享有声誉。
culturalAchievements.en: Raffia weaving, wood carving, and copper casting continued to develop. Loango enjoyed a European market reputation for high-quality raffia textiles.

languageFamily.zh: 尼日尔-刚果语系班图语支（维利语/基刚果语）
languageFamily.en: Bantu branch of Niger-Congo (Vili/Kikongo)

philosophy.zh: 祖灵崇拜与恩基西精灵信仰为核心的世界观，母系亲属关系构成伦理基础。
philosophy.en: A worldview centered on ancestral veneration and nkisi spirit beliefs, with matrilineal kinship forming the ethical foundation.

writingSystem.zh: 口述传统，部分商业记录使用葡萄牙文
writingSystem.en: Oral tradition, with some commercial records in Portuguese

unit.en: grams of silver equivalent per person

gdpDescription.zh: 17世纪中叶洛安果因大西洋奴隶贸易而经济活跃，成为刚果海岸最重要的贸易港口之一。同时保持农业和渔业基础。
gdpDescription.en: By the mid-17th century, Loango's economy was energized by the Atlantic slave trade, becoming one of the most important trade ports on the Congo coast. Agricultural and fishing bases were maintained.

mainIndustries.zh: 大西洋贸易（奴隶、象牙）、拉菲亚纺织、冶铜、渔业、农业
mainIndustries.en: Atlantic trade (slaves, ivory), raffia weaving, copper smelting, fishing, agriculture

tradeGoods.zh: 奴隶、象牙、拉菲亚布、铜器、红木、蜂蜡；进口枪支、纺织品、烈酒、铁器
tradeGoods.en: Slaves, ivory, raffia cloth, copper goods, redwood, beeswax; imports of firearms, textiles, spirits, iron goods

name.zh: 恩津布贝壳与欧洲货币

householdWealth.zh: 贸易商人家庭积累大量进口商品和奴隶；普通家庭以农田、渔具和拉菲亚布为资产。
householdWealth.en: Merchant households accumulated substantial imported goods and slaves; ordinary families held farmland, fishing equipment, and raffia cloth.

unit.en: grams of silver equivalent per year

economicSystem.zh: 大西洋贸易经济与传统贡赋体系并行。奴隶贸易利润正在重塑经济权力结构。
economicSystem.en: An Atlantic trade economy operating alongside the traditional tribute system. Slave trade profits were reshaping the economic power structure.

treasuryDescription.zh: 王室因大西洋贸易利润而财富增长，以进口商品、贝壳和象牙形式积累。
treasuryDescription.en: The royal treasury grew through Atlantic trade profits, accumulated in imported goods, shells, and ivory.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 维持大西洋贸易垄断、保障沿海贸易通道安全、控制武器进口分配。
fiscalPolicy.en: Maintaining the Atlantic trade monopoly, securing coastal trade routes, and controlling arms import distribution.

description.zh: 配备部分进口火器的王室精锐。
description.en: Royal elite, partly equipped with imported firearms.

description.zh: 各省征召的步兵力量。
description.en: Infantry levied from the provinces.

commanderInChief.zh: 马洛安果为最高统帅
commanderInChief.en: The Ma Loango served as supreme commander

technology.zh: 传统铁兵器与从欧洲进口的火枪并用。火器正改变军事力量平衡。
technology.en: Traditional iron weapons used alongside European-imported muskets. Firearms were changing the military balance of power.

threats.zh: 欧洲殖民势力的扩张、周边王国争夺贸易主导权、奴隶贸易带来的社会不稳定。
threats.en: Expansion of European colonial powers, neighboring kingdoms competing for trade dominance, and social instability from the slave trade.

populationDescription.zh: 人口沿刚果海岸和内陆分布。奴隶贸易正导致部分地区人口流失。
populationDescription.en: Population was distributed along the Congo coast and interior. The slave trade was causing population loss in some areas.

socialClasses.zh: 上层为王族和大贸易商；中层为自由农民、渔民和工匠；下层为附属民和日益增长的奴隶群体。
socialClasses.en: Upper strata were royalty and major traders; the middle comprised free farmers, fishermen, and artisans; lower groups were dependents and a growing slave population.

allies.zh: 与荷兰和英国商人保持贸易关系；与恩戈约和卡孔果姊妹王国联系
allies.en: Trade relations with Dutch and English merchants; ties with sister kingdoms Ngoyo and Kakongo

enemies.zh: 与刚果王国竞争贸易主导权；葡萄牙殖民势力构成长期威胁
enemies.en: Competing with the Kongo Kingdom for trade dominance; Portuguese colonial power posed a long-term threat

foreignPolicy.zh: 利用荷兰、英国、法国商人之间的竞争维持贸易自主权。
foreignPolicy.en: Leveraging competition among Dutch, English, and French merchants to maintain trade autonomy.

era.zh: 近代早期中非

keyInnovations.zh: 欧洲火器引入、改进的航海接触技术、拉菲亚纺织工艺进步。
keyInnovations.en: Introduction of European firearms, improved maritime contact techniques, and advances in raffia textile craft.

strengths.zh: 大西洋贸易带来的财富增长、在欧洲列强间保持外交平衡的能力。
strengths.en: Wealth growth from Atlantic trade and ability to maintain diplomatic balance among European powers.

weaknesses.zh: 奴隶贸易对社会的侵蚀、军事技术落后于欧洲、日益依赖外部贸易。
weaknesses.en: Social erosion from slave trade, military technology lagging behind Europe, and growing dependence on external trade.

outlook.zh: 洛安果将在18世纪继续作为大西洋贸易重要港口，但奴隶贸易将持续削弱社会基础。
outlook.en: Loango would continue as an important Atlantic trade port in the 18th century, but the slave trade would continue to erode its social foundations.

description.zh: 1648年大西洋贸易体系中的洛安果王国，刚果海岸重要商港。
description.en: The Loango Kingdom within the 1648 Atlantic trade system, an important Congo coast trading port.

governmentForm.zh: 萨赫勒伊斯兰苏丹国，结合伊斯兰统治合法性与地方部族协商
governmentForm.en: A Sahelian Islamic sultanate, combining Islamic ruling legitimacy with local tribal consultation

socialStructure.zh: 社会由苏丹王族、阿拉伯-马巴裔贵族、伊斯兰学者、游牧部族首领、定居农民、商人和奴隶构成。
socialStructure.en: Society consisted of the sultanic family, Arab-Maba nobles, Islamic scholars, nomadic tribal chiefs, settled farmers, merchants, and slaves.

rulingClass.zh: 苏丹家族、马巴族贵族与伊斯兰学者精英
rulingClass.en: The sultanic family, Maba-ethnic nobles, and Islamic scholarly elite

succession.zh: 苏丹位在王族内世袭，但常受宫廷政治和部族支持影响。
succession.en: The sultanate was hereditary within the royal house, but succession was often influenced by court politics and tribal support.

structure.zh: 苏丹宫廷设于瓦拉，通过省级首领和部族盟约管理广阔领土。伊斯兰法学家在行政和司法中发挥重要作用。
structure.en: The sultan's court was at Wara, governing wide territories through provincial chiefs and tribal alliances. Islamic jurists played important roles in administration and justice.

function.zh: 最高决策、外交和军事指挥中心。
function.en: Supreme decision-making, diplomatic, and military command center.

function.zh: 依伊斯兰法审理案件，管理宗教事务。
function.en: Adjudicated cases under Islamic law and managed religious affairs.

function.zh: 向属地和部族征收贡赋和税收。
function.en: Collected tribute and taxes from subject territories and tribes.

localAdmin.zh: 地方由省级首领和部族酋长管理，定居区域使用伊斯兰法，游牧区域依赖部族惯例。
localAdmin.en: Local areas were managed by provincial chiefs and tribal leaders; settled areas used Islamic law while nomadic zones relied on tribal custom.

legalSystem.zh: 马立克派伊斯兰法与地方习惯法并行。
legalSystem.en: Maliki Islamic law operated alongside local customary norms.

taxationSystem.zh: 以部族贡赋、牲畜税、跨撒哈拉贸易过境税和农业实物征收为主。
taxationSystem.en: Revenue came from tribal tribute, livestock taxes, trans-Saharan transit duties, and agricultural collections in kind.

religion.zh: 逊尼派伊斯兰教（马立克学派）
religion.en: Sunni Islam (Maliki school)

culturalAchievements.zh: 以伊斯兰教育、古兰经学校和跨撒哈拉文化交流闻名。瓦拉成为萨赫勒地区的学术中心之一。
culturalAchievements.en: Known for Islamic education, Qur'anic schools, and trans-Saharan cultural exchange. Wara became one of the scholarly centers of the Sahel.

languageFamily.zh: 尼罗-撒哈拉语系马巴语和阿拉伯语
languageFamily.en: Maba (Nilo-Saharan) and Arabic

philosophy.zh: 伊斯兰法学与政治伦理为核心，兼具萨赫勒地方传统。
philosophy.en: Islamic jurisprudence and political ethics were central, alongside Sahelian local traditions.

writingSystem.zh: 阿拉伯字母
writingSystem.en: Arabic script

unit.en: grams of silver equivalent per person

gdpDescription.zh: 经济以畜牧业、旱地农业和跨撒哈拉转口贸易为基础。奴隶贸易也是重要收入来源。
gdpDescription.en: The economy was based on pastoralism, dryland agriculture, and trans-Saharan transit trade. The slave trade was also an important income source.

mainIndustries.zh: 畜牧业、粟米种植、跨撒哈拉贸易、奴隶贸易、皮革加工、纺织
mainIndustries.en: Pastoralism, millet cultivation, trans-Saharan trade, slave trade, leatherwork, textiles

tradeGoods.zh: 奴隶、牲畜、皮革、象牙、鸵鸟羽毛；进口盐、布匹、武器
tradeGoods.en: Slaves, livestock, leather, ivory, ostrich feathers; imports of salt, cloth, weapons

name.zh: 玛利亚·特蕾莎银元与实物交换

householdWealth.zh: 游牧家庭以牲畜为核心资产；定居农民持有耕地和粮仓；商人积累贸易商品。
householdWealth.en: Nomadic households held livestock as core assets; settled farmers held arable land and granaries; merchants accumulated trade goods.

unit.en: grams of silver equivalent per year

economicSystem.zh: 贡赋经济与跨撒哈拉贸易并行，国家通过控制贸易路线和奴隶市场获取收入。
economicSystem.en: A tribute economy operating alongside trans-Saharan trade, with the state deriving income from controlling trade routes and slave markets.

treasuryDescription.zh: 国库以牲畜、奴隶、盐和进口商品为主要储备形式。
treasuryDescription.en: The treasury was held mainly in livestock, slaves, salt, and imported goods.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 维持军事优势以控制贸易路线并保护边疆。
fiscalPolicy.en: Maintaining military superiority to control trade routes and protect frontiers.

description.zh: 瓦达伊军事核心，以骑兵为主力。
description.en: The military core of Wadai, with cavalry as the main force.

description.zh: 从属地部族征召的步兵。
description.en: Infantry levied from subject tribes.

commanderInChief.zh: 苏丹为最高统帅
commanderInChief.en: The sultan served as supreme commander

technology.zh: 以骑兵战术为核心，使用矛、剑和部分进口火器。
technology.en: Centered on cavalry tactics, using spears, swords, and some imported firearms.

threats.zh: 与达尔富尔苏丹国和博尔努帝国的竞争，北方图阿雷格部族袭扰。
threats.en: Competition with Darfur and Bornu, and Tuareg raiding from the north.

populationDescription.zh: 人口分布在乍得湖以东的萨赫勒草原和绿洲地区。包括定居农民和游牧群体。
populationDescription.en: Population was distributed across Sahelian grasslands and oases east of Lake Chad, including settled farmers and nomadic groups.

socialClasses.zh: 上层为苏丹家族与部族贵族；中层包括商人、学者与自由牧民；下层为农民和奴隶。
socialClasses.en: Upper strata were the sultanic family and tribal nobles; the middle included merchants, scholars, and free pastoralists; lower groups were farmers and slaves.

allies.zh: 与北非商人网络保持贸易联系
allies.en: Trade connections with North African merchant networks

enemies.zh: 达尔富尔苏丹国是主要竞争对手
enemies.en: The Darfur Sultanate was the main rival

foreignPolicy.zh: 控制跨撒哈拉贸易路线、维持对属地部族的宗主权。
foreignPolicy.en: Controlling trans-Saharan trade routes and maintaining suzerainty over subject tribes.

era.zh: 近代早期萨赫勒

keyInnovations.zh: 骑兵战术、伊斯兰教育体系、旱地农牧适应技术。
keyInnovations.en: Cavalry tactics, Islamic educational systems, and dryland agro-pastoral adaptation.

strengths.zh: 骑兵力量强大、跨撒哈拉贸易要道控制力、伊斯兰合法性。
strengths.en: Strong cavalry, control over trans-Saharan trade routes, and Islamic legitimacy.

weaknesses.zh: 经济基础薄弱、人口有限、面对达尔富尔的持续竞争。
weaknesses.en: A thin economic base, limited population, and persistent competition from Darfur.

outlook.zh: 瓦达伊将在18-19世纪扩张为更强大的苏丹国。
outlook.en: Wadai would expand into a more powerful sultanate in the 18th-19th centuries.

description.zh: 乍得东部的瓦达伊苏丹国，萨赫勒地区的伊斯兰贸易国家。
description.en: The Wadai Sultanate of eastern Chad, an Islamic trading state of the Sahel.

dynasty.en: Appointed by the Republic of Genoa

governmentForm.zh: 热那亚共和国的海外属地，由总督直接治理，当地氏族在乡村保有实际权力
governmentForm.en: An overseas possession of the Republic of Genoa, directly governed by a governor, with local clans retaining practical power in the countryside

socialStructure.zh: 社会由热那亚官员与商人、科西嘉地方贵族与氏族首领、牧民、农民与渔民构成。氏族制度与血仇传统塑造了社会关系。
socialStructure.en: Society consisted of Genoese officials and merchants, Corsican local nobles and clan chiefs, pastoralists, farmers, and fishermen. Clan systems and vendetta traditions shaped social relations.

rulingClass.zh: 热那亚总督与官僚体系、科西嘉地方贵族家族
rulingClass.en: The Genoese governor and bureaucratic apparatus, and Corsican local noble families

succession.zh: 总督由热那亚共和国参议院任命并轮换。
succession.en: The governor was appointed and rotated by the Genoese Senate.

structure.zh: 巴斯蒂亚设总督府，管理税收、司法和军事事务。但热那亚的实际控制主要限于沿海城镇，内陆山区由科西嘉氏族自治。
structure.en: The governor's office in Bastia managed taxation, justice, and military affairs. But effective Genoese control was largely limited to coastal towns, with inland mountainous areas self-governed by Corsican clans.

function.zh: 岛上最高行政和军事机构。
function.en: Supreme administrative and military authority on the island.

function.zh: 征收岛上税赋并向热那亚汇缴。
function.en: Collected island taxes and remitted them to Genoa.

function.zh: 依热那亚法律审理案件，但管辖范围有限。
function.en: Adjudicated cases under Genoese law, but with limited jurisdiction.

localAdmin.zh: 沿海城镇由热那亚官员管理；内陆由科西嘉氏族首领自治，部分地区与热那亚当局存在长期紧张。
localAdmin.en: Coastal towns were managed by Genoese officials; the interior was self-governed by Corsican clan chiefs, with persistent tensions with Genoese authorities in some areas.

legalSystem.zh: 热那亚法律与科西嘉习惯法（含血仇惯例）并存。
legalSystem.en: Genoese law coexisted with Corsican customary law, including vendetta conventions.

taxationSystem.zh: 对沿海城镇征收商业税、关税和土地税；内陆税收征收困难。
taxationSystem.en: Commercial taxes, customs, and land taxes were levied on coastal towns; interior tax collection was difficult.

religion.zh: 天主教
religion.en: Roman Catholicism

culturalAchievements.zh: 科西嘉以口头传统（帕根莱拉挽歌）、传统农牧文化和基督教教堂建筑闻名。
culturalAchievements.en: Corsica was known for oral traditions (paghjella polyphonic singing), traditional agro-pastoral culture, and Christian church architecture.

languageFamily.zh: 罗曼语系（科西嘉语，与意大利语密切相关）
languageFamily.en: Romance (Corsican, closely related to Italian)

philosophy.zh: 以天主教信仰、氏族荣誉观和地方自治传统为核心的社会价值观。
philosophy.en: Social values centered on Catholic faith, clan honor codes, and local autonomy traditions.

writingSystem.zh: 拉丁字母（意大利语为正式语言，科西嘉语口头使用）
writingSystem.en: Latin script (Italian as formal language, Corsican used orally)

unit.en: grams of silver equivalent per person

gdpDescription.zh: 经济以山区畜牧（特别是山羊和绵羊）、栗子种植、橄榄油和渔业为基础。商业活动主要集中在巴斯蒂亚等沿海城镇。
gdpDescription.en: The economy was based on mountain pastoralism (especially goats and sheep), chestnut cultivation, olive oil, and fishing. Commercial activity was concentrated in coastal towns like Bastia.

mainIndustries.zh: 山区畜牧、栗子种植、橄榄油、渔业、沿海商贸
mainIndustries.en: Mountain pastoralism, chestnut cultivation, olive oil, fishing, coastal trade

tradeGoods.zh: 橄榄油、栗子、牲畜、蜡、蜂蜜、木材
tradeGoods.en: Olive oil, chestnuts, livestock, wax, honey, timber

householdWealth.zh: 大多数家庭以牲畜、栗树林和农田为资产；沿海商人有少量贸易资本。
householdWealth.en: Most households held livestock, chestnut groves, and farmland; coastal merchants had modest trade capital.

unit.en: grams of silver equivalent per year

economicSystem.zh: 半自给自足的农牧经济，热那亚主要从岛上提取税收而较少投资。
economicSystem.en: A semi-subsistent agro-pastoral economy, with Genoa mainly extracting taxes and investing little.

treasuryDescription.zh: 财政紧张，热那亚从岛上提取多于投入，驻军费用消耗了大部分收入。
treasuryDescription.en: Finances were tight, with Genoa extracting more than it invested, and garrison costs consuming most revenue.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 尽可能多地向热那亚输送资金，同时维持最低限度的军事控制。
fiscalPolicy.en: Remitting as much as possible to Genoa while maintaining minimal military control.

description.zh: 驻扎在沿海城堡和城镇的热那亚正规军。
description.en: Genoese regular troops stationed in coastal fortresses and towns.

description.zh: 从当地征召的非正规武装，忠诚度不稳定。
description.en: Irregular forces raised locally, with uncertain loyalty.

commanderInChief.zh: 热那亚总督兼任军事指挥
commanderInChief.en: The Genoese governor also served as military commander

technology.zh: 使用火枪和火炮守备沿海要塞，内陆居民大量持有轻型火器。
technology.en: Used muskets and cannon to defend coastal fortresses; inland inhabitants widely possessed light firearms.

threats.zh: 科西嘉人的反叛情绪、巴巴里海盗袭扰、法国和西班牙对地中海岛屿的觊觎。
threats.en: Corsican rebellious sentiment, Barbary pirate raids, and French and Spanish interest in Mediterranean islands.

populationDescription.zh: 人口分布在沿海城镇和内陆山区村落中。岛内居民以科西嘉本地人为主，热那亚人主要居住在巴斯蒂亚等城镇。
populationDescription.en: Population was distributed across coastal towns and inland mountain villages. Inhabitants were mostly native Corsicans, with Genoese mainly residing in towns like Bastia.

socialClasses.zh: 上层为热那亚官员和科西嘉地方贵族；中层为城镇商人、教士和自由农民；下层为山区牧民和农业劳工。
socialClasses.en: Upper strata were Genoese officials and Corsican local nobles; the middle comprised town merchants, clergy, and free farmers; lower groups were mountain pastoralists and agricultural laborers.

allies.zh: 作为热那亚属地，外交从属于热那亚共和国
allies.en: As a Genoese possession, diplomacy was subordinate to the Republic of Genoa

enemies.zh: 巴巴里海盗、法国（潜在觊觎者）
enemies.en: Barbary pirates, France (potential claimant)

foreignPolicy.zh: 热那亚试图维持对科西嘉的控制以保障地中海航线安全。
foreignPolicy.en: Genoa sought to maintain control over Corsica to secure Mediterranean shipping lanes.

era.zh: 近代早期地中海

keyInnovations.zh: 火器防御工事、地中海航海技术、山区农牧适应。
keyInnovations.en: Firearms fortifications, Mediterranean navigation, and mountain agro-pastoral adaptation.

strengths.zh: 战略地位重要、热那亚海军提供外部保护。
strengths.en: Strategically important location, with Genoese naval protection from outside.

weaknesses.zh: 热那亚统治不得人心、经济发展不足、内陆控制薄弱。
weaknesses.en: Unpopular Genoese rule, insufficient economic development, and weak inland control.

outlook.zh: 科西嘉人的反抗将在18世纪愈演愈烈，最终导致热那亚将该岛出售给法国。
outlook.en: Corsican resistance would intensify in the 18th century, ultimately leading Genoa to sell the island to France.

description.zh: 热那亚共和国统治下的科西嘉岛，地中海战略要地。
description.en: Corsica under the Republic of Genoa, a strategic Mediterranean location.

dynasty.en: Appointed by the Republic of Venice

governmentForm.zh: 威尼斯共和国的海外殖民地，由总督治理，正经历奥斯曼帝国的围攻（克里特战争1645-1669）
governmentForm.en: An overseas colony of the Republic of Venice, governed by a provveditore, undergoing Ottoman siege (Cretan War 1645-1669)

socialStructure.zh: 社会由威尼斯殖民贵族、希腊东正教地方精英、拉丁教会、城镇商人、农民和驻军士兵构成。威尼斯人与希腊人之间存在文化融合与等级分化。
socialStructure.en: Society consisted of Venetian colonial nobles, Greek Orthodox local elites, Latin clergy, town merchants, peasants, and garrison soldiers. Cultural blending and hierarchical division existed between Venetians and Greeks.

rulingClass.zh: 威尼斯殖民贵族家族、总督及其官僚团队、拉丁教会高层
rulingClass.en: Venetian colonial noble families, the governor and his bureaucratic staff, and senior Latin clergy

succession.zh: 总督由威尼斯参议院任命并定期轮换。
succession.en: The governor was appointed by the Venetian Senate and rotated periodically.

structure.zh: 坎迪亚设总督府，管理行政、军事和财政。1648年时克里特正处于奥斯曼围城战中（始于1645年），西部大部分已被奥斯曼占领，威尼斯控制区缩小到以坎迪亚为核心的城防区域。
structure.en: The governor's office in Candia managed administration, military, and finance. By 1648, Crete was in the midst of the Ottoman siege (begun 1645), with much of the west already under Ottoman control, and Venetian authority shrinking to the Candia fortress zone.

function.zh: 战时最高行政与军事指挥部。
function.en: Supreme wartime administrative and military command.

function.zh: 管理围城期间的物资供给、财政和补给线。
function.en: Managed supplies, finances, and supply lines during the siege.

function.zh: 维护和加固坎迪亚城防体系。
function.en: Maintained and strengthened the Candia fortification system.

localAdmin.zh: 战时行政高度军事化。威尼斯控制区内的民政从属于军事需求。已被奥斯曼占领的地区脱离威尼斯管辖。
localAdmin.en: Wartime administration was highly militarized. Civil administration in Venetian-controlled areas was subordinated to military needs. Areas already under Ottoman control had left Venetian jurisdiction.

legalSystem.zh: 威尼斯法律与希腊习惯法并行，战时实行军事法。
legalSystem.en: Venetian law and Greek customary law coexisted, with martial law in wartime.

taxationSystem.zh: 战时征收紧急税，威尼斯本土大量拨款支持防御。正常税制因战事中断。
taxationSystem.en: Emergency wartime taxes were levied, with substantial funding from Venice proper supporting the defense. Normal taxation was disrupted by the war.

religion.zh: 希腊东正教（当地多数）与天主教（威尼斯殖民者）并存
religion.en: Greek Orthodoxy (local majority) and Roman Catholicism (Venetian colonists) coexisted

culturalAchievements.zh: 克里特文艺复兴融合了威尼斯与拜占庭艺术传统，产生了杰出的图标画派（如埃尔·格列柯出身于此）和文学作品《埃罗托克里托斯》。
culturalAchievements.en: The Cretan Renaissance blended Venetian and Byzantine artistic traditions, producing outstanding icon-painting schools (El Greco originated here) and the literary masterpiece Erotokritos.

languageFamily.zh: 希腊语与意大利语（威尼斯方言）并用
languageFamily.en: Greek and Italian (Venetian dialect) used alongside each other

philosophy.zh: 拜占庭学术传统与威尼斯人文主义影响交融。
philosophy.en: Byzantine scholarly traditions blended with Venetian humanist influence.

writingSystem.zh: 希腊字母和拉丁字母并用
writingSystem.en: Greek and Latin alphabets both in use

unit.en: grams of silver equivalent per person

gdpDescription.zh: 经济因持续战争而严重萎缩。和平时期以葡萄酒（马尔瓦西亚酒）、橄榄油、谷物和地中海贸易为基础。1648年经济几乎完全围绕军事运转。
gdpDescription.en: The economy was severely contracted by ongoing warfare. In peacetime it had been based on wine (Malmsey), olive oil, grain, and Mediterranean trade. By 1648 the economy was almost entirely oriented around the military effort.

mainIndustries.zh: 军需生产、城防工程、残存的农业和渔业
mainIndustries.en: Military supply production, fortification work, and surviving agriculture and fishing

tradeGoods.zh: 战时贸易极为有限；和平时期出口葡萄酒、橄榄油、蜂蜜
tradeGoods.en: Wartime trade was extremely limited; peacetime exports had been wine, olive oil, and honey

householdWealth.zh: 战时大部分平民财产损毁或流失。威尼斯殖民贵族在坎迪亚城内仍保有部分房产。
householdWealth.en: Most civilian wealth was destroyed or lost during wartime. Venetian colonial nobles still retained some property within the walls of Candia.

unit.en: grams of silver equivalent per year

economicSystem.zh: 战时经济，几乎完全由军事需求主导，物资通过海运从威尼斯本土补给。
economicSystem.en: A wartime economy almost entirely dominated by military needs, with supplies brought by sea from Venice proper.

treasuryDescription.zh: 本地财政完全依赖威尼斯本土的巨额军事拨款。坎迪亚围城战是威尼斯共和国史上最昂贵的军事行动之一。
treasuryDescription.en: Local finances were entirely dependent on massive military appropriations from Venice proper. The siege of Candia was one of the most expensive military operations in Venetian history.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 纯粹的战时财政：一切资源服务于城防。
fiscalPolicy.en: Purely wartime fiscal management: all resources served the defense effort.

description.zh: 从威尼斯本土和各领地调来的正规部队。
description.en: Regular troops drawn from Venice proper and its various territories.

description.zh: 来自欧洲各国的雇佣兵和基督教志愿者。
description.en: Mercenaries and Christian volunteers from across Europe.

description.zh: 当地希腊和威尼斯裔居民组成的民兵。
description.en: Militia composed of local Greek and Venetian-descended inhabitants.

commanderInChief.zh: 威尼斯总督指挥城防，得到威尼斯参议院遥控支持
commanderInChief.en: The Venetian governor commanded the defense, with remote support from the Venetian Senate

technology.zh: 坎迪亚拥有当时欧洲最先进的棱堡防御体系之一，配备大量火炮。围城战成为欧洲军事工程的经典案例。
technology.en: Candia possessed one of Europe's most advanced bastion-fort defense systems of the era, equipped with numerous cannon. The siege became a classic case study in European military engineering.

threats.zh: 奥斯曼帝国的围城军（约6万人），是直接的生存性威胁。
threats.en: The besieging Ottoman army (approximately 60,000 men) posed a direct existential threat.

populationDescription.zh: 战前克里特约有20万人口，但围城期间因战争、饥荒和逃亡而大幅减少。坎迪亚城内困守着军民约4万人。
populationDescription.en: Pre-war Crete had approximately 200,000 people, but the population was drastically reduced during the siege by war, famine, and flight. About 40,000 military and civilian personnel were trapped inside Candia.

socialClasses.zh: 战时社会以军人为主导；威尼斯殖民贵族、希腊东正教士绅、商人和普通居民在围城中共同抵抗。
socialClasses.en: Wartime society was dominated by the military; Venetian colonial nobles, Greek Orthodox gentry, merchants, and common residents resisted together during the siege.

allies.zh: 威尼斯共和国（宗主国）、教皇国和法国等基督教国家提供间歇性支援
allies.en: The Republic of Venice (the metropolitan power), with intermittent support from the Papacy, France, and other Christian states

enemies.zh: 奥斯曼帝国是直接敌人
enemies.en: The Ottoman Empire was the direct enemy

foreignPolicy.zh: 全力争取基督教欧洲的军事和财政援助以维持坎迪亚防御。
foreignPolicy.en: All-out efforts to secure military and financial aid from Christian Europe to sustain the defense of Candia.

era.zh: 近代早期欧洲军事工程高峰
era.en: Peak of early modern European military engineering

keyInnovations.zh: 世界领先的棱堡防御设计、重型火炮部署、地下反坑道作战技术和海上补给线管理。
keyInnovations.en: World-leading bastion defense design, heavy artillery deployment, underground counter-mining warfare, and maritime supply-line management.

strengths.zh: 顶级城防工事、威尼斯海军的补给能力、基督教世界的道义支持。
strengths.en: Top-tier fortifications, Venetian naval resupply capability, and moral support from Christendom.

weaknesses.zh: 奥斯曼军队的压倒性数量优势、长期围困导致的资源耗竭、欧洲援助的不稳定性。
weaknesses.en: Overwhelming Ottoman numerical advantage, resource exhaustion from prolonged siege, and unreliable European aid.

outlook.zh: 坎迪亚将坚守至1669年，成为世界军事史上最长的城市围攻之一（21年），最终威尼斯被迫割让克里特。
outlook.en: Candia would hold out until 1669, becoming one of the longest city sieges in world military history (21 years), with Venice ultimately forced to cede Crete.

description.zh: 威尼斯属克里特，正经历奥斯曼帝国的长期围攻。
description.en: Venetian Crete, undergoing a prolonged Ottoman siege.

description.zh: 欧洲各国签署《威斯特伐利亚和约》，结束了三十年战争。和约确立了国家主权原则和领土完整的国际法准则，奠定了现代国际关系体系的基础。
description.en: European powers signed the Peace of Westphalia, ending the Thirty Years' War. The treaty established the principles of state sovereignty and territorial integrity in international law, laying the foundation for the modern international system.

title.en: Execution of King Charles I of England

description.zh: 英格兰国王查理一世在内战中被议会军击败后被送上断头台。这是欧洲历史上首次由法律程序处决在位君主，英格兰随后建立了共和政体。
description.en: King Charles I of England was executed after being defeated by Parliamentary forces in the civil war. This was the first legal execution of a reigning monarch in European history, after which England established a republican government.

title.zh: 清军入关征服中国南方

description.zh: 清朝军队继续向南推进，逐步消灭南明各割据政权。清军攻陷广州、桂林等地，南明抵抗力量节节败退，清朝对中国的统一进程加速推进。
description.en: Qing armies continued their southward advance, gradually eliminating various Southern Ming resistance regimes. The Qing captured Guangzhou, Guilin, and other cities, as Southern Ming resistance steadily crumbled, accelerating Qing unification of China.

title.zh: 荷兰在南非建立开普殖民地
title.en: Dutch Establish Cape Colony in South Africa

description.zh: 荷兰东印度公司的扬·范·里贝克在好望角建立补给站，这成为开普殖民地的起源。该定居点为荷兰船只前往亚洲提供淡水和食物补给。
description.en: Jan van Riebeeck of the Dutch East India Company established a supply station at the Cape of Good Hope, founding what became the Cape Colony. The settlement provided fresh water and provisions for Dutch ships en route to Asia.

description.zh: 英格兰共和国与荷兰共和国之间爆发了第一次海上战争。两国争夺海上贸易霸权，英国的《航海条例》严重损害了荷兰的转口贸易利益。
description.en: The first naval war erupted between the English Commonwealth and the Dutch Republic. The two nations competed for maritime trade supremacy, with England's Navigation Acts severely damaging Dutch entrepôt trade interests.

title.zh: 奥斯曼帝国柯普鲁吕改革
title.en: Köprülü Reforms in the Ottoman Empire

description.zh: 穆罕默德·柯普鲁吕被任命为奥斯曼帝国大维齐尔，开启了一系列旨在恢复帝国实力的改革。他整顿军纪、清除腐败、平定叛乱，暂时扭转了帝国的颓势。
description.en: Mehmed Köprülü was appointed Grand Vizier of the Ottoman Empire, initiating reforms to restore imperial strength. He restored military discipline, purged corruption, and suppressed revolts, temporarily reversing the empire's decline.

title.zh: 莫卧儿帝国奥朗则布夺取皇位

description.zh: 奥朗则布在莫卧儿帝国的皇位争夺战中击败兄弟们，囚禁父亲沙贾汗后登基为帝。他的统治将使莫卧儿帝国疆域达到最大，但严厉的宗教政策也埋下了帝国衰落的种子。
description.en: Aurangzeb defeated his brothers in the Mughal succession war, imprisoned his father Shah Jahan, and seized the throne. His reign would bring the Mughal Empire to its greatest extent, but his strict religious policies sowed the seeds of imperial decline.

title.zh: 英国斯图亚特王朝复辟

description.zh: 查理二世返回伦敦复辟斯图亚特王朝，结束了克伦威尔护国政体。君主制得到恢复，但议会保留了相当大的权力，英国宪政体制继续发展。
description.en: Charles II returned to London to restore the Stuart monarchy, ending Cromwell's Protectorate. The monarchy was restored, but Parliament retained significant power, as the English constitutional system continued to develop.

description.zh: 法国首相马扎然去世后，年轻的路易十四宣布亲政。他将构建高度中央集权的绝对君主制，将法国打造为欧洲最强大的国家，并修建凡尔赛宫作为权力的象征。
description.en: After the death of Cardinal Mazarin, young Louis XIV declared his personal rule. He would build a highly centralized absolute monarchy, making France the most powerful state in Europe, and construct Versailles as a symbol of his power.

description.zh: 南明延平王郑成功率两万五千大军围攻台湾的荷兰殖民据点热兰遮城。经过九个月的围城，荷兰总督揆一投降，台湾回归汉人统治。
description.en: Southern Ming loyalist Zheng Chenggong besieged the Dutch colonial fortress Fort Zeelandia in Taiwan with 25,000 troops. After a nine-month siege, Dutch Governor Coyett surrendered, restoring Taiwan to Han Chinese rule.

description.zh: 年仅八岁的玄烨即位为清朝第四位皇帝，年号康熙。康熙帝将成为中国历史上在位时间最长的皇帝之一，在其统治下清朝进入鼎盛时期。
description.en: Eight-year-old Xuanye ascended the Qing throne as the Kangxi Emperor. Kangxi would become one of the longest-reigning emperors in Chinese history, presiding over the Qing dynasty's golden age.

title.zh: 牛顿发展微积分与万有引力理论
title.en: Newton Develops Calculus and Gravity Theory

description.zh: 艾萨克·牛顿在伦敦大瘟疫期间回到家乡，进行了一系列划时代的科学研究。他在此期间发展了微积分、万有引力定律和光的色散理论，奠定了近代物理学的基础。
description.en: Isaac Newton retreated to his family home during the London plague and conducted groundbreaking scientific work. During this period, he developed calculus, the law of universal gravitation, and the theory of light dispersion, laying the foundations of modern physics.

title.zh: 奥斯曼帝国征服克里特

description.zh: 奥斯曼帝国经过长达二十五年的战争，终于征服了威尼斯控制的克里特岛。伊拉克利翁要塞的陷落标志着威尼斯在东地中海最重要殖民地的丧失。
description.en: After a twenty-five-year war, the Ottoman Empire finally conquered Venetian-held Crete. The fall of the fortress of Heraklion marked Venice's loss of its most important colony in the eastern Mediterranean.

title.zh: 刚果王国与葡萄牙的冲突

description.zh: 安布威拉战役中葡萄牙军队击败刚果王国，刚果国王安东尼奥一世阵亡。此战严重削弱了刚果王国的中央集权，导致其陷入长期的内战与分裂。
description.en: Portuguese forces defeated the Kongo Kingdom at the Battle of Mbwila, killing King António I. This battle severely weakened Kongo's central authority, plunging the kingdom into prolonged civil war and fragmentation.

title.zh: 马拉塔帝国西瓦吉加冕

description.zh: 马拉塔领袖西瓦吉在赖加德堡举行盛大的加冕典礼，正式建立马拉塔王国。西瓦吉对抗莫卧儿帝国的英雄事迹成为印度民族主义的重要象征。
description.en: Maratha leader Shivaji was crowned king in a grand ceremony at Raigad Fort, formally establishing the Maratha Kingdom. Shivaji's heroic resistance against the Mughal Empire became an enduring symbol of Indian nationalism.

title.zh: 菲利普王战争：新英格兰殖民地危机
title.en: King Philip's War: New England Colonial Crisis

description.zh: 万帕诺亚格酋长梅塔科姆特（菲利普王）率领联合部落力量反抗英国殖民扩张。这场战争是北美殖民时期最具破坏性的冲突之一，造成双方大量伤亡。
description.en: Wampanoag chief Metacom (King Philip) led a coalition of tribes against English colonial expansion. This war was one of the most destructive conflicts of the North American colonial period, causing heavy casualties on both sides.

title.en: England Passes the Habeas Corpus Act

description.zh: 英格兰议会通过《人身保护法》，确立了未经合法审判不得任意拘禁公民的原则。这一法律成为英国宪政传统和人权保障的基石。
description.en: The English Parliament passed the Habeas Corpus Act, establishing the principle that citizens could not be arbitrarily imprisoned without legal proceedings. This law became a cornerstone of English constitutional tradition and human rights protection.

title.en: Kangxi Emperor Suppresses the Revolt of Three Feudatories

description.zh: 康熙帝经过八年艰苦平叛，最终彻底平定吴三桂等三藩的叛乱。此战巩固了清朝对南方的统治，也展示了年轻康熙帝的军事才能和政治决断力。
description.en: After eight years of arduous campaigns, the Kangxi Emperor finally suppressed the revolt of Wu Sangui and the Three Feudatories. This victory consolidated Qing rule over southern China and demonstrated the young emperor's military talent and political resolve.

title.zh: 奥斯曼帝国围攻维也纳失败

description.zh: 奥斯曼帝国大军围攻哈布斯堡首都维也纳，波兰国王扬·索别斯基率联军解围。这场战役标志着奥斯曼帝国在欧洲扩张的终结，此后帝国转入战略守势。
description.en: The Ottoman army besieged the Habsburg capital Vienna, but Polish King Jan Sobieski led a relief force that broke the siege. This battle marked the end of Ottoman expansion into Europe, as the empire shifted to strategic defense.

title.zh: 路易十四废除《南特敕令》
title.en: Louis XIV Revokes the Edict of Nantes

description.zh: 法王路易十四颁布《枫丹白露敕令》，废除了保护胡格诺派的《南特敕令》。约二十万胡格诺派教徒逃离法国，带走了宝贵的技术人才，对法国经济造成严重打击。
description.en: Louis XIV issued the Edict of Fontainebleau, revoking the Edict of Nantes that had protected Huguenots. Approximately 200,000 Huguenots fled France, taking valuable technical skills and dealing a severe blow to the French economy.

description.zh: 荷兰执政威廉三世应英国议会邀请率军登陆英格兰，天主教国王詹姆斯二世逃亡法国。这场不流血的政变确立了议会主权原则和君主立宪制。
description.en: Dutch Stadtholder William III, invited by the English Parliament, landed in England with his army. Catholic King James II fled to France. This bloodless coup established parliamentary sovereignty and constitutional monarchy.

title.en: Treaty of Nerchinsk Signed Between China and Russia

description.zh: 清朝与俄罗斯帝国签订《尼布楚条约》，这是中国与西方国家签订的第一个平等条约。条约划定了中俄东部边界，暂时解决了两国在黑龙江流域的领土争端。
description.en: The Qing dynasty and Russian Empire signed the Treaty of Nerchinsk, China's first formal treaty with a Western power. The treaty delineated the eastern Sino-Russian border, temporarily resolving territorial disputes in the Amur River region.

title.zh: 荷兰东印度公司控制马鲁古群岛
title.en: Dutch East India Company Controls the Moluccas

description.zh: 荷兰东印度公司通过一系列军事征服和商业协定，基本垄断了马鲁古群岛的丁香和肉豆蔻贸易。荷兰成为东南亚最具影响力的欧洲殖民势力。
description.en: The Dutch East India Company, through a series of military conquests and trade agreements, largely monopolized the clove and nutmeg trade of the Moluccas. The Dutch became the most influential European colonial power in Southeast Asia.

title.zh: 法荷战争：路易十四入侵荷兰
title.en: Franco-Dutch War: Louis XIV Invades the Netherlands

description.zh: 路易十四率法军大举入侵荷兰共和国。荷兰人掘开堤坝以水代兵阻挡法军推进，威廉三世被任命为执政。这场战争重塑了欧洲的权力均衡格局。
description.en: Louis XIV led a massive French invasion of the Dutch Republic. The Dutch opened their dikes to halt the French advance, and William III was appointed Stadtholder. This war reshaped the European balance of power.
